provider-specific reasoning lever (e.g., high, medium, minimal)\"\n1282:             - \"--dangerously-skip-permissions enables hands-off automation; sandboxMode='read-only' is not currently honored (no opencode equivalent)\"\n1283:             - \"cli-opencode self-invocation guard: this single-executor branch must only run from a non-OpenCode dispatch surface (Claude Code/raw shell). Explicit parallel-detached cli-opencode fan-out is handled by step_fanout_spawn_cli/fanout-run.cjs, not this branch. the `cli-external/cli-opencode` mode's SKILL.md (`.opencode/skills/cli-external/cli-opencode/SKILL.md`) §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate\"\n1284:         post_dispatch_validate:\n1285:           validator: \".opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/lib/deep-loop/post-dispatch-validate.ts#validateIterationOutputs\"\n1286:           command: \"node .opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/scripts/verify-iteration.cjs --loop-type review --artifact-dir {artifact_dir} --iteration {current_iteration}\"\n1287:           command_note: \"Mechanical leaf-reliability gate: exit 0 = complete; non-zero prints one machine reason (iteration_file_missing|iteration_verdict_missing|state_record_missing|route_proof_missing|route_proof_mismatch|delta_file_missing). The script enforces the artifact + route-proof contract instead of trusting the leaf to self-report, and a non-zero exit triggers on_failure.redispatch_once.\"\n1288:           assert_exists: \"{state_paths.iteration_pattern}\"\n1289:           assert_appended: \"{state_paths.state_log}\"\n1290:           assert_jsonl_fields: [type, iteration, mode, run, status, focus, dimensions, filesReviewed, findingsCount, findingsSummary, findingsNew, findingDetails, newFindingsRatio, sessionId, generation, lineageMode, timestamp, durationMs]\n1291:           route_proof:\n1292:             mode: review\n1293:             target_agent: deep-review\n1294:             agent_definition_loaded: true\n1295:             resolved_route: \"Resolved route: mode=review target_agent=deep-review\"\n1296:           dispatchReceipt:\n1297:             receiptDir: \"{state_paths.packet_dir}/dispatch-receipts\"\n1298:             dispatchId: \"review-i{current_iteration}-g{generation}\"\n1299:           assert_canonical_type: \"iteration\"\n1300:           assert_delta_file_exists: \"{state_paths.delta_pattern}\"\n1301:           assert_delta_file_has_iteration_record: true\n1302:           failure_reasons:\n1303:             - iteration_file_missing\n1304:             - iteration_file_empty\n1305:             - jsonl_not_appended\n1306:             - jsonl_missing_fields\n1307:             - jsonl_parse_error\n1308:             - jsonl_wrong_type\n1309:             - delta_file_missing\n1310:             - delta_file_empty\n1311:             - delta_file_missing_iteration_record\n1312:             - executor_missing\n1313:             - dispatch_failure_logged\n1314:             - v2_missing_ledger\n1315:             - v2_uncited_ledger_row\n1316:             - v2_broken_linked_finding\n1317:             - v2_shallow_finding_details\n1318:             - delta_iteration_id_mismatch\n1319:             - state_delta_iteration_mismatch\n1320:             - route_proof_missing\n1321:             - route_proof_mismatch\n1322:           warning_surface:\n1323:             source: \"result.warnings\"\n1324:             action: \"emit schema_advisory canonical conflict event\"\n1325:             severity: \"advisory\"\n1326:             event_shape: '{\"type\":\"event\",\"event\":\"schema_advisory\",\"mode\":\"review\",\"iteration\":{current_iteration},\"warnings\":{result.warnings},\"severity\":\"advisory\",\"timestamp\":\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\"}'\n1327:             note: \"Warnings do not fail dispatch. Hard failures still emit schema_mismatch through on_failure.\"\n1328:           on_failure:\n1329:             action: \"emit schema_mismatch canonical conflict event\"\n1330:             redispatch_once: \"On the FIRST failure of the mechanical command check for this iteration, re-run step_dispatch_iteration exactly once for the same iteration number, then re-run the check. If it still fails, record the iteration as error (per step_evaluate_results.on_missing_outputs) and continue. Never re-dispatch a given iteration more than once.\"\n1331:             escalation: \"After 3 consecutive failures across iterations, trigger stuck_recovery event with diagnostic context\"\n1332:         record_executor_audit:\n1333:           skip_when: \"config.executor.kind == 'native'\"\n1334:           target: \"{state_paths.state_log}\"\n1335:           field: \"executor\"\n1336:           value:\n1337:             kind: \"{config.executor.kind}\"\n1338:             model: \"{config.executor.model}\"\n1339:             reasoningEffort: \"{config.executor.reasoningEffort}\"\n1340:             serviceTier: \"{config.executor.serviceTier}\"\n1341: \n1342:       step_evaluate_results:\n1343:         action: \"Verify iteration outputs and extract metrics\"\n1344:         verify:\n1345:           - file_exists: \"{state_paths.iteration_pattern}\"\n1346:           - jsonl_appended: \"New iteration record in state.jsonl\"\n1347:           - strategy_updated: \"Strategy.md has been modified\"\n1348:         extract:\n1349:           - newFindingsRatio: \"From latest JSONL iteration record\"\n1350:           - findings_count: \"From latest JSONL iteration record\"\n1351:           - severity_counts: \"From latest JSONL iteration record (P0, P1, P2)\"\n1352:           - dimensions: \"From latest JSONL iteration record\"\n1353:           - files_reviewed: \"From latest JSONL iteration record\"\n1354:           - status: \"From latest JSONL iteration record\"\n1355:           - reviewed_artifacts: \"From latest JSONL iteration record\"\n1356:           - traceability_checks: \"From latest JSONL iteration record when present\"\n1357:         on_missing_outputs:\n1358:           action: \"Mark iteration as 'error', continue to next\"\n1359:           # Canonical iteration record: include sessionId, generation, durationMs so the reducer can persist\n1360:           # the failure without dropping the iteration. Schema source: state_format.md §Iteration Records.\n1361:           append_jsonl: '{\"type\":\"iteration\",\"iteration\":{current_iteration},\"run\":{current_iteration},\"mode\":\"review\",\"status\":\"error\",\"focus\":\"{next_dimension}\",\"dimensions\":[\"{next_dimension}\"],\"filesReviewed\":[],\"findingsCount\":0,\"findingsSummary\":{\"P0\":0,\"P1\":0,\"P2\":0},\"findingsNew\":{\"P0\":0,\"P1\":0,\"P2\":0},\"findingDetails\":[],\"traceabilityChecks\":{\"summary\":{\"required\":0,\"executed\":0,\"pass\":0,\"partial\":0,\"fail\":0,\"blocked\":0,\"notApplicable\":0,\"gatingFailures\":0},\"results\":[]},\"newFindingsRatio\":0.0,\"durationMs\":0,\"timestamp\":\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\",\"sessionId\":\"{config.lineage.sessionId}\",\"generation\":{config.lineage.generation},\"lineageMode\":\"{config.lineage.lineageMode}\"}'\n1362: \n1363:       step_post_iteration_claim_adjudication:\n1364:         action: \"Validate typed claim-adjudication packets for any new P0/P1 findings and persist the result to state.jsonl so the next iteration's claimAdjudicationGate can read it\"\n1365:         verify:\n1366:           - typed_packets_present: \"Every new P0/P1 finding in review/iterations/iteration-{NNN}.md contains a claim-adjudication JSON block\"\n1367:           - packet_fields: \"Each packet includes claim, evidenceRefs, counterevidenceSought, alternativeExplanation, finalSeverity, confidence, downgradeTrigger\"\n1368:           - missing_packet_ids: \"List of new P0/P1 finding IDs that are missing a typed packet or field; empty array when all packets validate\"\n1369:         on_pass:\n1370:           set:\n1371:             claim_adjudication_passed: true\n1372:           append_jsonl: '{\"type\":\"event\",\"event\":\"claim_adjudication\",\"mode\":\"review\",\"run\":{current_iteration},\"passed\":true,\"activeP0P1\":{active_p0_p1_count},\"missingPackets\":[],\"timestamp\":\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\",\"sessionId\":\"{session_id}\",\"generation\":{generation}}'\n1373:           log: \"Claim adjudication passed for iteration {current_iteration}. All new P0/P1 findings have typed packets.\"\n1374:         on_fail:\n1375:           action: \"Mark the iteration as invalid for convergence. The next iteration's claimAdjudicationGate (step_check_convergence step 0) reads the persisted `passed: false` event and vetoes STOP until a follow-up iteration rewrites the packets.\"\n1376:           set:\n1377:             claim_adjudication_passed: false\n1378:           append_jsonl: '{\"type\":\"event\",\"event\":\"claim_adjudication\",\"mode\":\"review\",\"run\":{current_iteration},\"passed\":false,\"activeP0P1\":{active_p0_p1_count},\"missingPackets\":{missing_packet_ids},\"reason\":\"Missing typed packet fields for new P0/P1 findings\",\"timestamp\":\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\",\"sessionId\":\"{session_id}\",\"generation\":{generation}}'\n1379:           log: \"Claim adjudication incomplete for new P0/P1 findings. Event persisted. The next iteration's step_check_convergence claim-adjudication pre-check will veto STOP while `passed: false` remains the latest event and active P0/P1 > 0.\"\n1380: \n1381:       step_reduce_review_state:\n1382:         action: \"Run reducer to refresh the canonical findings registry before dashboard generation\"\n1383:         command: \"node .opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/scripts/reduce-state.cjs {spec_folder}\"\n1384:         read:\n1385:           - \"{state_paths.state_log}\"\n1386:           - \"{state_paths.iteration_pattern}\"\n1387:           - \"{state_paths.findings_registry}\"\n1388:           - \"{state_paths.strategy}\"\n1389:         write:\n1390:           - \"{state_paths.findings_registry}\"\n1391:           - \"{state_paths.dashboard}\"\n1392:           - \"{state_paths.strategy}\"\n1393:         failure_modes:\n1394:           malformed_delta: \"skip + warn\"\n1395:           missing_iteration_file: \"no-op + error\"\n1396:           schema_mismatch: \"reject + conflict event\"\n1397:         guarantee: \"Idempotent for identical inputs\"\n1398:         note: \"Reducer outputs findingsRegistry, dashboardMetrics, and strategyUpdates. Re-running the same inputs must be idempotent.\"\n1399: \n1400:       step_graph_upsert:\n\n(Output capped at 50 KB. Showing lines 634-1400. Use offset=1401 to continue.)\n</content>","metadata":{"preview":"               fix_completeness_replay_passing_rows = numeric count of required closed-gate replay rows marked PASS with evidence\n               candidate_coverage_gate_pass = boolean\n               candidate_coverage_search_debt_json = JSON array of reducer-owned searchDebt obligations blocking STOP, else []\n               candidate_coverage_missing_json = JSON array of required bug classes not present in candidateCoverage.covered, else []\n               graphless_fallback_gate_pass = boolean\n               graphless_fallback_mode = latest reducer-owned searchCoverage.graphCoverageMode value\n               graphless_fallback_missing_json = JSON array of required bug classes without cited fallback ledger rows, else []\n               graphless_fallback_unavailability_reason = explicit reason when graphCoverageMode == \"unavailable_blocked\", else empty string\n               recovery_strategy = one-line hint describing the next review action needed to satisfy the failed gates; combine candidateCoverageGate and graphlessFallbackGate recovery guidance when both fail (when claimAdjudicationGate is the failing gate, prefer the step-0 recovery_strategy already set)\n          6. COMBINED STOP RULE:\n               a) if STOP is legal AND graph_decision == \"STOP_ALLOWED\": decision = \"STOP\"\n               b) if STOP is legal AND graph_decision == \"STOP_BLOCKED\":\n                    decision = \"BLOCKED\"\n                    stop_blocked = true\n                    stopReason = \"blockedStop\"\n                    # Blocked-stop closure: blockedBy must be string[] per the\n                    # published review blocked-stop contract. Extract the `.type`\n                    # field from each structured graph blocker; preserve the full\n                    # objects in graph_blocker_detail_json for operator inspection.\n                    blocked_by_json = JSON.stringify(graph_blockers_json.map(b => typeof b === \"string\" ? b : (b && b.type) || \"graph_blocker\"))","truncated":true,"loaded":[],"display":{"type":"file","path":"/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_review_auto.yaml","text":"               fix_completeness_replay_passing_rows = numeric count of required closed-gate replay rows marked PASS with evidence\n               candidate_coverage_gate_pass = boolean\n               candidate_coverage_search_debt_json = JSON array of reducer-owned searchDebt obligations blocking STOP, else []\n               candidate_coverage_missing_json = JSON array of required bug classes not present in candidateCoverage.covered, else []\n               graphless_fallback_gate_pass = boolean\n               graphless_fallback_mode = latest reducer-owned searchCoverage.graphCoverageMode value\n               graphless_fallback_missing_json = JSON array of required bug classes without cited fallback ledger rows, else []\n               graphless_fallback_unavailability_reason = explicit reason when graphCoverageMode == \"unavailable_blocked\", else empty string\n               recovery_strategy = one-line hint describing the next review action needed to satisfy the failed gates; combine candidateCoverageGate and graphlessFallbackGate recovery guidance when both fail (when claimAdjudicationGate is the failing gate, prefer the step-0 recovery_strategy already set)\n          6. COMBINED STOP RULE:\n               a) if STOP is legal AND graph_decision == \"STOP_ALLOWED\": decision = \"STOP\"\n               b) if STOP is legal AND graph_decision == \"STOP_BLOCKED\":\n                    decision = \"BLOCKED\"\n                    stop_blocked = true\n                    stopReason = \"blockedStop\"\n                    # Blocked-stop closure: blockedBy must be string[] per the\n                    # published review blocked-stop contract. Extract the `.type`\n                    # field from each structured graph blocker; preserve the full\n                    # objects in graph_blocker_detail_json for operator inspection.\n                    blocked_by_json = JSON.stringify(graph_blockers_json.map(b => typeof b === \"string\" ? b : (b && b.type) || \"graph_blocker\"))\n                    blocked_by_csv = graph_blockers_csv\n                    graph_blocker_detail_json = graph_blockers_json\n                    recovery_strategy = \"Resolve review coverage-graph blockers before stopping.\"\n               c) if STOP is legal AND graph_decision == \"CONTINUE\":\n                    decision = \"CONTINUE\"\n                    stop_blocked = false\n                    reason = \"graph_convergence_continue\"\n               d) else keep the existing STUCK_RECOVERY or CONTINUE outcome\n        outputs:\n          - decision: \"STOP | BLOCKED | STUCK_RECOVERY | CONTINUE\"\n          - reason: \"Human-readable stop reason\"\n          - stop_blocked: \"Boolean true when STOP is vetoed by inline legal-stop gates or graph_decision == STOP_BLOCKED\"\n          - blocked_by_json: \"JSON array of failed legal-stop gates when decision == BLOCKED\"\n          - blocked_by_csv: \"Comma-separated list of failed legal-stop gates when decision == BLOCKED\"\n          - convergence_gate_pass: \"Boolean pass/fail for convergenceGate\"\n          - convergence_gate_score: \"Numeric score recorded for convergenceGate\"\n          - dimension_coverage_gate_pass: \"Boolean pass/fail for dimensionCoverageGate\"\n          - dimension_coverage_gate_covered_json: \"JSON array of covered review dimensions\"\n          - dimension_coverage_gate_missing_json: \"JSON array of missing review dimensions\"\n          - p0_resolution_gate_pass: \"Boolean pass/fail for p0ResolutionGate\"\n          - active_p0_count: \"Active P0 finding count at stop-check time\"\n          - evidence_density_gate_pass: \"Boolean pass/fail for evidenceDensityGate\"\n          - avg_evidence_per_finding: \"Numeric evidence density for active findings\"\n          - hotspot_saturation_gate_pass: \"Boolean pass/fail for hotspotSaturationGate\"\n          - claim_adjudication_gate_pass: \"Boolean pass/fail for claimAdjudicationGate (false vetoes STOP)\"\n          - claim_adjudication_active_count: \"Count of active P0/P1 findings evaluated by claimAdjudicationGate\"\n          - fix_completeness_replay_gate_pass: \"Boolean pass/fail for fixCompletenessReplayGate (false vetoes STOP on security-sensitive fix reruns)\"\n          - security_sensitive_fix_scope: \"Boolean true when the review is a security-sensitive fix rerun\"\n          - fix_completeness_replay_required_rows: \"Count of closed-gate replay rows required before STOP\"\n          - fix_completeness_replay_passing_rows: \"Count of required closed-gate replay rows that passed with evidence\"\n          - candidate_coverage_gate_pass: \"Boolean pass/fail for candidateCoverageGate (false vetoes STOP for unresolved reducer-owned search debt or uncovered required bug classes)\"\n          - candidate_coverage_search_debt_json: \"JSON array of reducer-owned searchDebt obligations used as blocked-stop evidence\"\n          - candidate_coverage_missing_json: \"JSON array of required bug classes missing from candidateCoverage.covered\"\n          - graphless_fallback_gate_pass: \"Boolean pass/fail for graphlessFallbackGate (false vetoes STOP when graphless fallback evidence is absent or unavailable_blocked)\"\n          - graphless_fallback_mode: \"Latest reducer-owned searchCoverage.graphCoverageMode value\"\n          - graphless_fallback_missing_json: \"JSON array of required bug classes missing cited fallback ledger rows\"\n          - graphless_fallback_unavailability_reason: \"Explicit unavailability reason when graphCoverageMode == unavailable_blocked\"\n          - graph_decision: \"CONTINUE | STOP_ALLOWED | STOP_BLOCKED from step_graph_convergence\"\n          - graph_signals_json: \"JSON object returned by graph convergence\"\n          - graph_blockers_json: \"JSON array of graph blockers\"\n          - graph_blockers_csv: \"Comma-separated graph blocker summary\"\n          - recovery_strategy: \"One-line hint describing the next review action when decision == BLOCKED or STUCK_RECOVERY\"\n\n      step_emit_blocked_stop:\n        action: \"Persist blocked-stop evidence whenever the review legal-stop decision tree vetoes STOP\"\n        if_blocked:\n          append_jsonl: '{\"type\":\"event\",\"event\":\"blocked_stop\",\"mode\":\"review\",\"run\":{current_iteration},\"blockedBy\":{blocked_by_json},\"gateResults\":{\"convergenceGate\":{\"pass\":{convergence_gate_pass},\"score\":{convergence_gate_score}},\"dimensionCoverageGate\":{\"pass\":{dimension_coverage_gate_pass},\"covered\":{dimension_coverage_gate_covered_json},\"missing\":{dimension_coverage_gate_missing_json}},\"p0ResolutionGate\":{\"pass\":{p0_resolution_gate_pass},\"activeP0\":{active_p0_count}},\"evidenceDensityGate\":{\"pass\":{evidence_density_gate_pass},\"avgEvidencePerFinding\":{avg_evidence_per_finding}},\"hotspotSaturationGate\":{\"pass\":{hotspot_saturation_gate_pass}},\"claimAdjudicationGate\":{\"pass\":{claim_adjudication_gate_pass},\"activeP0P1\":{claim_adjudication_active_count}},\"fixCompletenessReplayGate\":{\"pass\":{fix_completeness_replay_gate_pass},\"securitySensitive\":{security_sensitive_fix_scope},\"requiredRows\":{fix_completeness_replay_required_rows},\"passingRows\":{fix_completeness_replay_passing_rows}},\"candidateCoverageGate\":{\"pass\":{candidate_coverage_gate_pass},\"searchDebt\":{candidate_coverage_search_debt_json},\"missing\":{candidate_coverage_missing_json}},\"graphlessFallbackGate\":{\"pass\":{graphless_fallback_gate_pass},\"mode\":\"{graphless_fallback_mode}\",\"missing\":{graphless_fallback_missing_json},\"unavailabilityReason\":\"{graphless_fallback_unavailability_reason}\"}},\"graphBlockerDetail\":{graph_blockers_json},\"recoveryStrategy\":\"{recovery_strategy}\",\"timestamp\":\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\",\"sessionId\":\"{session_id}\",\"generation\":{generation}}'\n          log: \"Blocked STOP persisted for review loop. Failed gates: {blocked_by_csv}. Recovery strategy: {recovery_strategy}\"\n        if_not_blocked:\n          proceed: true\n\n      step_handle_convergence:\n        action: \"Act on convergence decision\"\n        if_stop:\n          branch_on: \"convergence_mode == 'divergent' AND reason == 'all_dimensions_clean'\"\n          if_divergent_eligible:\n            eligibility_contract:\n              required_decision: \"STOP\"\n              eligible_reasons: [all_dimensions_clean]\n              excluded_reasons: [maxIterationsReached, blockedStop, stuckRecovery, error, manualStop, userPaused]\n              fail_closed: \"Any missing or ambiguous reason uses if_existing_terminal_path without preparing a pivot. The nine legal-stop gates have already run and remain unchanged.\"\n            steps:\n              step_prepare_divergent_pivot:\n                action: \"Generate state-grounded read-only review candidates and prepare or resume the pivot transaction\"\n                command: |\n                  node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'\n                  import {\n                    buildReviewPivotPreparationInput,\n                    renderReviewPivotSeatPrompt,\n                  } from './.opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/deep-review/scripts/divergent-review-pivot.ts';\n                  import {\n                    preparePivotTransaction,\n                  } from './.opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/lib/deep-loop/divergent-pivot.ts';\n\n                  const input = buildReviewPivotPreparationInput({\n                    artifactRoot: '{state_paths.packet_dir}',\n                    configPath: '{state_paths.config}',\n                    stateLogPath: '{state_paths.state_log}',\n                    strategyPath: '{state_paths.strategy}',\n                    registryPath: '{state_paths.findings_registry}',\n                    currentIteration: Number('{current_iteration}'),\n                    maxIterations: Number('{max_iterations}'),\n                    triggerReason: '{reason}',\n                  });\n                  const prepared = await preparePivotTransaction(input);\n                  const seatPrompts = prepared.status === 'pending'\n                    ? Object.fromEntries(prepared.missingSeats.map((seat) => [\n                        seat.id,\n                        renderReviewPivotSeatPrompt(seat, prepared.dispatchContext),\n                      ]))\n                    : {};\n                  process.stdout.write(`${JSON.stringify({\n                    ...prepared,\n                    seatPrompts,\n                    boundaryRejections: input.boundaryRejections,\n                  })}\\n`);\n                  EOF\n                working_directory: \"{repo_root}\"\n                outputs:\n                  - pivot_prepare_json: \"The complete parsed JSON result\"\n                  - pivot_prepare_status: \"status from the prepare result\"\n                  - pivot_id: \"pivotId from the prepare result\"\n                  - pivot_paths_json: \"paths from the prepare result as JSON\"\n                  - pivot_resumed: \"resumed from the prepare result\"\n                  - pivot_missing_seat_ids: \"missingSeats ids from a pending result\"\n                  - pivot_seat_001_json: \"The seat-001 mandate object from missingSeats\"\n                  - pivot_seat_002_json: \"The seat-002 mandate object from missingSeats\"\n                  - pivot_seat_003_json: \"The seat-003 mandate object from missingSeats\"\n                  - pivot_seat_001_prompt: \"seatPrompts['seat-001']\"\n                  - pivot_seat_002_prompt: \"seatPrompts['seat-002']\"\n                  - pivot_seat_003_prompt: \"seatPrompts['seat-003']\"\n                  - pivot_dispatch_context_json: \"dispatchContext from a pending result as JSON\"\n                short_circuit: \"When status is completed or failed, skip all dispatch and record steps and bind this result as pivot_result.\"\n\n              step_dispatch_pivot_seat_001:\n                action: \"Natively dispatch the analytical read-only review direction-selection seat\"\n                skip_when: \"pivot_prepare_status != 'pending' or pivot_missing_seat_ids does not contain 'seat-001'\"\n                capture_timing: true\n                if_native:\n                  dispatch:\n                    agent: deep-review\n                    model: opus\n                    context_source: \"pivot_seat_001_prompt\"\n                  wait_for_completion: true\n                failure_contract: \"A native dispatch failure binds status=rejected, a {name,message} error, and the measured timestamps/duration, then proceeds to step_record_pivot_seat_001.\"\n                outputs:\n                  - pivot_seat_001_dispatch_status: \"fulfilled or rejected\"\n                  - pivot_seat_001_output_json: \"Raw native return serialized as JSON when fulfilled\"\n                  - pivot_seat_001_error_json: \"{name,message} when rejected\"\n                  - pivot_seat_001_started_at_iso: \"Dispatch start timestamp\"\n                  - pivot_seat_001_completed_at_iso: \"Dispatch completion timestamp\"\n                  - pivot_seat_001_duration_ms: \"Dispatch duration in milliseconds\"\n\n              step_record_pivot_seat_001:\n                action: \"Durably record the seat-001 native dispatch outcome\"\n                skip_when: \"pivot_prepare_status != 'pending' or pivot_missing_seat_ids does not contain 'seat-001'\"\n                command: |\n                  node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'\n                  import { recordPivotSeatResult } from './.opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/lib/deep-loop/divergent-pivot.ts';\n                  const status = '{pivot_seat_001_dispatch_status}';\n                  const outcome = status === 'fulfilled'\n                    ? { status, output: {pivot_seat_001_output_json}, startedAtIso: '{pivot_seat_001_started_at_iso}', completedAtIso: '{pivot_seat_001_completed_at_iso}', durationMs: Number('{pivot_seat_001_duration_ms}') }\n                    : { status: 'rejected', error: {pivot_seat_001_error_json}, startedAtIso: '{pivot_seat_001_started_at_iso}', completedAtIso: '{pivot_seat_001_completed_at_iso}', durationMs: Number('{pivot_seat_001_duration_ms}') };\n                  process.stdout.write(`${JSON.stringify(recordPivotSeatResult({ paths: {pivot_paths_json}, pivotId: '{pivot_id}', seat: {pivot_seat_001_json}, outcome }))}\\n`);\n                  EOF\n                working_directory: \"{repo_root}\"\n\n              step_dispatch_pivot_seat_002:\n                action: \"Natively dispatch the critical read-only review direction-selection seat\"\n                skip_when: \"pivot_prepare_status != 'pending' or pivot_missing_seat_ids does not contain 'seat-002'\"\n                capture_timing: true\n                if_native:\n                  dispatch:\n                    agent: deep-review\n                    model: opus\n                    context_source: \"pivot_seat_002_prompt\"\n                  wait_for_completion: true\n                failure_contract: \"A native dispatch failure binds status=rejected, a {name,message} error, and the measured timestamps/duration, then proceeds to step_record_pivot_seat_002.\"\n                outputs:\n                  - pivot_seat_002_dispatch_status: \"fulfilled or rejected\"\n                  - pivot_seat_002_output_json: \"Raw native return serialized as JSON when fulfilled\"\n                  - pivot_seat_002_error_json: \"{name,message} when rejected\"\n                  - pivot_seat_002_started_at_iso: \"Dispatch start timestamp\"\n                  - pivot_seat_002_completed_at_iso: \"Dispatch completion timestamp\"\n                  - pivot_seat_002_duration_ms: \"Dispatch duration in milliseconds\"\n\n              step_record_pivot_seat_002:\n                action: \"Durably record the seat-002 native dispatch outcome\"\n                skip_when: \"pivot_prepare_status != 'pending' or pivot_missing_seat_ids does not contain 'seat-002'\"\n                command: |\n                  node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'\n                  import { recordPivotSeatResult } from './.opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/lib/deep-loop/divergent-pivot.ts';\n                  const status = '{pivot_seat_002_dispatch_status}';\n                  const outcome = status === 'fulfilled'\n                    ? { status, output: {pivot_seat_002_output_json}, startedAtIso: '{pivot_seat_002_started_at_iso}', completedAtIso: '{pivot_seat_002_completed_at_iso}', durationMs: Number('{pivot_seat_002_duration_ms}') }\n                    : { status: 'rejected', error: {pivot_seat_002_error_json}, startedAtIso: '{pivot_seat_002_started_at_iso}', completedAtIso: '{pivot_seat_002_completed_at_iso}', durationMs: Number('{pivot_seat_002_duration_ms}') };\n                  process.stdout.write(`${JSON.stringify(recordPivotSeatResult({ paths: {pivot_paths_json}, pivotId: '{pivot_id}', seat: {pivot_seat_002_json}, outcome }))}\\n`);\n                  EOF\n                working_directory: \"{repo_root}\"\n\n              step_dispatch_pivot_seat_003:\n                action: \"Natively dispatch the pragmatic read-only review direction-selection seat\"\n                skip_when: \"pivot_prepare_status != 'pending' or pivot_missing_seat_ids does not contain 'seat-003'\"\n                capture_timing: true\n                if_native:\n                  dispatch:\n                    agent: deep-review\n                    model: opus\n                    context_source: \"pivot_seat_003_prompt\"\n                  wait_for_completion: true\n                failure_contract: \"A native dispatch failure binds status=rejected, a {name,message} error, and the measured timestamps/duration, then proceeds to step_record_pivot_seat_003.\"\n                outputs:\n                  - pivot_seat_003_dispatch_status: \"fulfilled or rejected\"\n                  - pivot_seat_003_output_json: \"Raw native return serialized as JSON when fulfilled\"\n                  - pivot_seat_003_error_json: \"{name,message} when rejected\"\n                  - pivot_seat_003_started_at_iso: \"Dispatch start timestamp\"\n                  - pivot_seat_003_completed_at_iso: \"Dispatch completion timestamp\"\n                  - pivot_seat_003_duration_ms: \"Dispatch duration in milliseconds\"\n\n              step_record_pivot_seat_003:\n                action: \"Durably record the seat-003 native dispatch outcome\"\n                skip_when: \"pivot_prepare_status != 'pending' or pivot_missing_seat_ids does not contain 'seat-003'\"\n                command: |\n                  node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'\n                  import { recordPivotSeatResult } from './.opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/lib/deep-loop/divergent-pivot.ts';\n                  const status = '{pivot_seat_003_dispatch_status}';\n                  const outcome = status === 'fulfilled'\n                    ? { status, output: {pivot_seat_003_output_json}, startedAtIso: '{pivot_seat_003_started_at_iso}', completedAtIso: '{pivot_seat_003_completed_at_iso}', durationMs: Number('{pivot_seat_003_duration_ms}') }\n                    : { status: 'rejected', error: {pivot_seat_003_error_json}, startedAtIso: '{pivot_seat_003_started_at_iso}', completedAtIso: '{pivot_seat_003_completed_at_iso}', durationMs: Number('{pivot_seat_003_duration_ms}') };\n                  process.stdout.write(`${JSON.stringify(recordPivotSeatResult({ paths: {pivot_paths_json}, pivotId: '{pivot_id}', seat: {pivot_seat_003_json}, outcome }))}\\n`);\n                  EOF\n                working_directory: \"{repo_root}\"\n\n              step_finalize_divergent_pivot:\n                action: \"Finalize the prepared pivot after all missing native seats are durable\"\n                skip_when: \"pivot_prepare_status != 'pending'\"\n                command: |\n                  node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'\n                  import { finalizePivotTransaction } from './.opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/lib/deep-loop/divergent-pivot.ts';\n                  process.stdout.write(`${JSON.stringify(finalizePivotTransaction({ paths: {pivot_paths_json}, pivotId: '{pivot_id}', resumed: {pivot_resumed} }))}\\n`);\n                  EOF\n                working_directory: \"{repo_root}\"\n                outputs:\n                  - pivot_finalize_json: \"The complete parsed final result\"\n\n              step_resolve_divergent_pivot_result:\n                action: \"Use prepare's terminal result on resume/short-circuit, otherwise use finalize's result\"\n                branch_on: \"pivot_prepare_status\"\n                if_pending: { bind: { pivot_result: \"{pivot_finalize_json}\" } }\n                if_completed_or_failed: { bind: { pivot_result: \"{pivot_prepare_json}\" } }\n\n              step_apply_divergent_pivot_result:\n                action: \"Adopt a successful read-only review direction or fail closed to the existing synthesis path\"\n                branch_on: \"pivot_result.status\"\n                if_completed:\n                  set:\n                    next_dimension: \"{pivot_result.restoredFocus}\"\n                    pivot_lineage: \"Pivot {pivot_result.pivotId} selected {pivot_result.selectedCandidate.id} from source iteration {current_iteration}.\"\n                    saturated_directions: \"{pivot_result.completedEvent.saturatedDirections}\"\n                  command: \"node .opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/scripts/reduce-state.cjs {spec_folder}\"\n                  log: \"Divergent review pivot {pivot_result.pivotId} restored focus to {pivot_result.restoredFocus}; continuing iteration {current_iteration}.\"\n                  proceed_to: step_normalize_pause_events\n                if_failed:\n                  log: \"Divergent review pivot {pivot_result.pivotId} failed closed ({pivot_result.failureReason}); proceeding to synthesis.\"\n                  skip_to: phase_synthesis\n            on_error:\n              log: \"Divergent review pivot integration error; failing closed to the existing synthesis path.\"\n              skip_to: phase_synthesis\n          if_existing_terminal_path:\n            log: \"Loop stopping. Reason: {reason}\"\n            skip_to: phase_synthesis\n        if_blocked:\n          log: \"Legal-stop gates blocked STOP. Failed gates: {blocked_by_csv}. Continuing review.\"\n        if_stuck_recovery:\n          log: \"Stuck detected ({stuck_count} consecutive no-progress). Entering recovery.\"\n          recovery_strategies:\n            - \"Change granularity: file-level → function-level → line-level review\"\n            - \"Traceability protocol replay: re-run unresolved core or overlay checks\"\n            - \"Escalate severity review: re-examine P2 findings for potential P1 upgrades\"\n          pivot_target: \"Pivot to the least-covered dimension (the review dimension with the fewest iteration passes and lowest coverage ratio).\"\n          set:\n            next_dimension: \"RECOVERY: {recovery_strategy}. Least-covered dimension: {least_explored}\"\n            pending_stop_event: \"stuck_recovery\"\n            pending_stop_reason: \"stuckRecovery\"\n            pending_stop_detail: \"Recovery path activated after repeated no-progress iterations\"\n          reset: { stuck_count: 0 }\n        if_continue:\n          log: \"Iteration {current_iteration}: Continuing. Dimension: {next_dimension}\"\n\n      step_normalize_pause_events:\n        action: \"Rewrite raw pause and recovery events to the frozen STOP_REASONS enum at emission time: converged, maxIterationsReached, blockedStop, stuckRecovery, error, manualStop, userPaused\"\n        if_pending_pause_event:\n          append_jsonl: '{\"type\":\"event\",\"event\":\"userPaused\",\"mode\":\"review\",\"stopReason\":\"userPaused\",\"reason\":\"{pending_stop_detail}\",\"timestamp\":\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\",\"sessionId\":\"{session_id}\",\"generation\":{generation}}'\n          message: \"Review paused. Delete review/.deep-review-pause to resume.\"\n          reset:\n            pending_stop_event: null\n            pending_stop_reason: null\n            pending_stop_detail: null\n          halt: true\n        if_pending_stuck_recovery:\n          append_jsonl: '{\"type\":\"event\",\"event\":\"stuckRecovery\",\"mode\":\"review\",\"stopReason\":\"stuckRecovery\",\"fromIteration\":{current_iteration},\"strategy\":\"{recovery_strategy}\",\"targetDimension\":\"{least_explored}\",\"outcome\":\"pending\",\"reason\":\"{pending_stop_detail}\",\"timestamp\":\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\",\"sessionId\":\"{session_id}\",\"generation\":{generation}}'\n          reset:\n            pending_stop_event: null\n            pending_stop_reason: null\n            pending_stop_detail: null\n        if_no_pending_event:\n          proceed: true\n\n      step_generate_state_summary:\n        action: \"Generate compact state summary for dispatch context (~200 tokens)\"\n        generate: |\n          STATE SUMMARY (auto-generated):\n          Iteration: {current_iteration} of {max_iterations}\n          Dimension: {next_dimension}\n          Prior Findings: P0={p0_count} P1={p1_count} P2={p2_count}\n          Dimension Coverage: {dimensions_covered_list} ({dimension_coverage})\n          Traceability: core={core_protocol_status} overlay={overlay_protocol_status}\n          {resource_map_prompt_line}\n          Coverage Age: {coverage_age}\n          Last 2 ratios: {ratio_prev} -> {ratio_latest}\n          Stuck count: {stuck_count}\n          Provisional Verdict: {PASS|CONDITIONAL|FAIL|PENDING} hasAdvisories={has_advisories}\n\n      step_marker_scan:\n        action: \"H-2 loop-prevention guard: scan previous iteration's rendered prompt for nested review marker\"\n        algorithm: |\n          if current_iteration > 1:\n            PREV_PROMPT_PATH = \"{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{previous_iteration}.md\"\n            if file_exists(PREV_PROMPT_PATH):\n              PREV_PROMPT_FIRST_LINE = head -1 of PREV_PROMPT_PATH\n              if PREV_PROMPT_FIRST_LINE matches ^(DEEP-REVIEW|DEEP-RESEARCH|CODE-REVIEW)$:\n                log \"ERROR: nested review-of-review loop detected (marker found in previous iteration prompt). Aborting.\"\n                halt with exit code 2\n        note: |\n          False-positive prevention: only matches when the first line is exactly one of the\n          three canonical markers. Markers appearing in comments or body text are ignored.\n          True-positive triggers only when a previous iteration's rendered prompt literally\n          starts with a deep-loop marker, indicating a nested review-of-review dispatch.\n\n      step_dispatch_iteration:\n        action: \"Dispatch @deep-review agent for one review iteration\"\n        resolve_executor:\n          source: \"config.executor\"\n          loader: \".opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts#parseExecutorConfig\"\n        pre_dispatch:\n          generate_summary: |\n            STATE SUMMARY (auto-generated):\n            Iteration: {current_iteration} of {max_iterations}\n            Dimension: {next_dimension}\n            Prior Findings: P0={p0_count} P1={p1_count} P2={p2_count}\n            Dimension Coverage: {dimensions_covered_list} ({dimension_coverage})\n            Traceability: core={core_protocol_status} overlay={overlay_protocol_status}\n            {resource_map_prompt_line}\n            Coverage Age: {coverage_age}\n            Last 2 ratios: {ratio_prev} -> {ratio_latest}\n            Stuck count: {stuck_count}\n            Provisional Verdict: {PASS|CONDITIONAL|FAIL|PENDING} hasAdvisories={has_advisories}\n          render_prompt_pack:\n            template_path: \".opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/deep-review/assets/prompt_pack_iteration.md.tmpl\"\n            renderer: \".opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/lib/deep-loop/prompt-pack.ts#renderPromptPack\"\n            output_path: \"{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md\"\n            variables:\n              state_summary: \"{state_summary}\"\n              current_iteration: \"{current_iteration}\"\n              max_iterations: \"{max_iterations}\"\n              next_dimension: \"{next_dimension}\"\n              review_target: \"{review_target}\"\n              review_scope_files: \"{review_scope_files}\"\n              p0_count: \"{p0_count}\"\n              p1_count: \"{p1_count}\"\n              p2_count: \"{p2_count}\"\n              pivot_lineage: \"{pivot_lineage}\"\n              saturated_directions: \"{saturated_directions}\"\n              state_paths_config: \"{state_paths.config}\"\n              state_paths_state_log: \"{state_paths.state_log}\"\n              state_paths_findings_registry: \"{state_paths.findings_registry}\"\n              state_paths_strategy: \"{state_paths.strategy}\"\n              state_paths_iteration_pattern: \"{state_paths.iteration_pattern}\"\n              state_paths_delta_pattern: \"{state_paths.delta_pattern}\"\n        pre_dispatch_audit:\n          skip_when: \"config.executor.kind == 'native'\"\n          call: \".opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-audit.ts#writeFirstRecordExecutor\"\n          args:\n            stateLogPath: \"{state_paths.state_log}\"\n            executor: \"{config.executor}\"\n            iteration: \"{current_iteration}\"\n        branch_on: \"config.executor.kind\"\n        if_native:\n          dispatch:\n            agent: deep-review\n            model: opus\n            context_source: \"rendered_prompt_pack\"\n          wait_for_completion: true\n        if_cli_copilot:\n          command: |\n            node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'\n            import { readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs';\n            import { createHash } from 'node:crypto';\n\n            import { runAuditedExecutorCommand } from './.opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-audit.ts';\n            import { buildCopilotPromptArg } from './.opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts';\n\n            const promptPath = '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md';\n            const prompt = readFileSync(promptPath, 'utf8');\n\n            // Workflow-resolved spec folder is the only legal write authority.\n            // The helper (`validateSpecFolder` inside `buildCopilotPromptArg`)\n            // is the single source of truth for rejecting empty / unresolved\n            // template / whitespace-only / string-coerced empty values. The\n            // YAML hands the raw `{spec_folder}` directly; on rejection the\n            // helper safe-fails to `type:\"missing\", writeIntent:true` (Gate-3\n            // enforcement, --allow-all-tools stripped).\n            const specFolderRaw = '{spec_folder}';\n            const targetAuthority = { type: 'approved', specFolder: specFolderRaw };\n\n            const baseArgs = [\n              '-p',\n              prompt,\n              '--model',\n              '{config.executor.model}',\n              '--allow-all-tools',\n              '--no-ask-user',\n            ];\n\n            const built = buildCopilotPromptArg({\n              promptPath,\n              prompt,\n              targetAuthority,\n              baseArgv: baseArgs,\n            });\n\n            // Large-prompt @PROMPT_PATH wrapper: helper emits a `promptFileBody`\n            // containing `<TARGET AUTHORITY preamble>\\n\\n---\\n\\n<original>`.\n            // Write it to disk so the file Copilot reads via @path opens with\n            // the authority block. Without this, recovered/bootstrap folder\n            // mentions inside the file could still anchor the model.\n            if (built.promptFileBody !== undefined) {\n              writeFileSync(promptPath, built.promptFileBody, 'utf8');\n            }\n\n            // Copilot is routed through the audited executor wrapper so it produces\n            // INTENT + COMPLETION dispatch receipts alongside claude-code/opencode\n            // There is no cli-copilot kind in the executor schema, so it\n            // dispatches as kind:'native' (full env passthrough, no recursion-guard\n            // layer configured for copilot); the receipt still records the real\n            // 'copilot' command + built.argv as facts.\n            const dispatchFacts = {\n              command: 'deep/review',\n              mode: 'review',\n              specFolder: '{spec_folder}',\n              artifactDir: '{state_paths.packet_dir}',\n              iteration: Number('{current_iteration}'),\n              executorKind: '{config.executor.kind}',\n              branchId: '{config.executor.kind}',\n              sessionId: '{session_id}',\n              generation: Number('{generation}'),\n            };\n            const dispatchId = 'review-i{current_iteration}-g{generation}';\n            process.exit(\n              runAuditedExecutorCommand({\n                command: 'copilot',\n                args: built.argv,\n                cwd: '{repo_root}',\n                timeoutSeconds: Number('{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}'),\n                stateLogPath: '{state_paths.state_log}',\n                executor: {\n                  kind: 'native',\n                  model: '{config.executor.model}',\n                  configDir: null,\n                  reasoningEffort: null,\n                  serviceTier: null,\n                  sandboxMode: null,\n                  timeoutSeconds: Number('{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}'),\n                  governor: null,\n                },\n                iteration: Number('{current_iteration}'),\n                receiptDir: '{state_paths.packet_dir}/dispatch-receipts',\n                dispatchId,\n              }),\n            );\n            EOF\n          working_directory: \"{repo_root}\"\n          timeout_seconds: \"{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}\"\n          wait_for_completion: true\n          notes:\n            - \"Routed through runAuditedExecutorCommand so copilot produces INTENT + COMPLETION dispatch receipts; built.argv (@PROMPT_PATH or positional) is forwarded verbatim as the receipt facts\"\n            - \"copilot has no stdin support; prompt is positional\"\n            - \"Size check uses 16KB threshold; above that uses @PROMPT_PATH wrapper prompt\"\n            - \"Large-prompt path relies on copilot honoring @path references within its prompt string\"\n            - \"buildCopilotPromptArg attaches a TARGET AUTHORITY preamble bound to the workflow-approved spec folder; recovered context cannot override it (authority guard source: .opencode/commands/speckit/assets/speckit_deep-review_auto.yaml)\"\n            - \"If spec_folder is missing/malformed/unresolved on a write-intent dispatch, the helper enforces plan-only by replacing the prompt with a Gate-3 question and stripping --allow-all-tools\"\n            - \"Large-prompt wrapper mode rewrites the prompt file at promptPath to include the TARGET AUTHORITY preamble (prefix + divider + original body); the argv becomes a bare @promptPath reference\"\n        if_cli_claude_code:\n          command: |\n            node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'\n            import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs';\n            import { createHash } from 'node:crypto';\n\n            import { runAuditedExecutorCommand } from './.opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-audit.ts';\n\n            const configDir = '{optional_claude_config_dir}';\n            const reasoningEffort = '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}';\n            const executor = {\n              kind: 'cli-claude-code',\n              model: '{config.executor.model}',\n              configDir: configDir || null,\n              reasoningEffort,\n              serviceTier: null,\n              sandboxMode: null,\n              timeoutSeconds: Number('{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}'),\n              governor: null,\n            };\n            const args = [\n              '-p',\n              readFileSync('{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md', 'utf8'),\n              '--model',\n              executor.model,\n              '--permission-mode',\n              'acceptEdits',\n              '--output-format',\n              'text',\n            ];\n            if (executor.reasoningEffort) {\n              args.push('--effort', executor.reasoningEffort);\n            }\n\n            // CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR rides through guardContext.env; the CLAUDE_ prefix is\n            // on the cli-claude-code env allowlist so buildExecutorDispatchEnv admits it.\n            const parentEnv = { ...process.env };\n            if (configDir) {\n              parentEnv.CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR = configDir;\n            }\n\n            const dispatchFacts = {\n              command: 'deep/review',\n              mode: 'review',\n              specFolder: '{spec_folder}',\n              artifactDir: '{state_paths.packet_dir}',\n              iteration: Number('{current_iteration}'),\n              executorKind: '{config.executor.kind}',\n              branchId: '{config.executor.kind}',\n              sessionId: '{session_id}',\n              generation: Number('{generation}'),\n            };\n            const dispatchId = 'review-i{current_iteration}-g{generation}';\n            process.exit(\n              runAuditedExecutorCommand({\n                command: 'claude',\n                args,\n                cwd: '{repo_root}',\n                timeoutSeconds: executor.timeoutSeconds,\n                stateLogPath: '{state_paths.state_log}',\n                executor,\n                iteration: Number('{current_iteration}'),\n                guardContext: { env: parentEnv },\n                receiptDir: '{state_paths.packet_dir}/dispatch-receipts',\n                dispatchId,\n              }),\n            );\n            EOF\n          working_directory: \"{repo_root}\"\n          timeout_seconds: \"{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}\"\n          wait_for_completion: true\n          render_hint:\n            optional_claude_config_dir: |\n              If config.executor.configDir is set and non-null, expand a leading ~ to HOME and bind that path.\n              Otherwise expand to empty string.\n          notes:\n            - \"Routed through runAuditedExecutorCommand so claude-code produces INTENT + COMPLETION dispatch receipts; recursion guard + env allowlist enforced via buildExecutorDispatchEnv\"\n            - \"CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR is forwarded through guardContext.env (CLAUDE_ prefix is allowlisted) so account-specific Claude Code routing is preserved\"\n            - \"permission-mode stays acceptEdits (review's existing iteration-write behavior); claude-code has no serviceTier flag\"\n            - \"claude-code supports --effort for reasoning depth\"\n        if_cli_opencode:\n          command: |\n            node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'\n            import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs';\n            import { createHash } from 'node:crypto';\n\n            import { runAuditedExecutorCommand } from './.opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-audit.ts';\n\n            const reasoningEffort = '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}';\n            const executor = {\n              kind: 'cli-opencode',\n              model: '{config.executor.model}',\n              configDir: null,\n              reasoningEffort,\n              serviceTier: null,\n              sandboxMode: null,\n              timeoutSeconds: Number('{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}'),\n              governor: null,\n            };\n            const promptBody = readFileSync('{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md', 'utf8');\n            const message = 'Resolved route: mode=review; target_agent=@deep-review; execution=single_review_iteration; state_source=externalized_files; do_not_switch_mode=true'\n              + '\\n\\n'\n              + promptBody;\n            const args = [\n              'run',\n              '--model',\n              executor.model,\n              '--format',\n              'json',\n              '--dangerously-skip-permissions',\n              '--pure',\n              '--dir',\n              '{repo_root}',\n            ];\n            if (executor.reasoningEffort) {\n              args.push('--variant', executor.reasoningEffort);\n            }\n            args.push(message);\n\n            const dispatchFacts = {\n              command: 'deep/review',\n              mode: 'review',\n              specFolder: '{spec_folder}',\n              artifactDir: '{state_paths.packet_dir}',\n              iteration: Number('{current_iteration}'),\n              executorKind: '{config.executor.kind}',\n              branchId: '{config.executor.kind}',\n              sessionId: '{session_id}',\n              generation: Number('{generation}'),\n            };\n            const dispatchId = 'review-i{current_iteration}-g{generation}';\n            process.exit(\n              runAuditedExecutorCommand({\n                command: 'opencode',\n                args,\n                cwd: '{repo_root}',\n                timeoutSeconds: executor.timeoutSeconds,\n                stateLogPath: '{state_paths.state_log}',\n                executor,\n                iteration: Number('{current_iteration}'),\n                // opencode v1.14.39 reads stdin at startup before session creation;\n                // an empty input gives EOF stdin, equivalent to </dev/null.\n                input: '',\n                receiptDir: '{state_paths.packet_dir}/dispatch-receipts',\n                dispatchId,\n              }),\n            );\n            EOF\n          working_directory: \"{repo_root}\"\n          timeout_seconds: \"{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}\"\n          wait_for_completion: true\n          notes:\n            - \"Routed through runAuditedExecutorCommand so opencode produces INTENT + COMPLETION dispatch receipts; recursion guard + env allowlist enforced via buildExecutorDispatchEnv\"\n            - \"input:'' yields closed stdin (EOF), equivalent to </dev/null — opencode v1.14.39 reads stdin at startup and hangs at 0% CPU after +60s snapshot prune without it (the `cli-external/cli-opencode` mode's SKILL.md (`.opencode/skills/cli-external/cli-opencode/SKILL.md`) §4 ALWAYS rule)\"\n            - \"opencode run takes a positional message; prompt is the route-proof preamble + iteration body\"\n            - \"--variant maps reasoningEffort to opencode's provider-specific reasoning lever (e.g., high, medium, minimal)\"\n            - \"--dangerously-skip-permissions enables hands-off automation; sandboxMode='read-only' is not currently honored (no opencode equivalent)\"\n            - \"cli-opencode self-invocation guard: this single-executor branch must only run from a non-OpenCode dispatch surface (Claude Code/raw shell). Explicit parallel-detached cli-opencode fan-out is handled by step_fanout_spawn_cli/fanout-run.cjs, not this branch. the `cli-external/cli-opencode` mode's SKILL.md (`.opencode/skills/cli-external/cli-opencode/SKILL.md`) §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate\"\n        post_dispatch_validate:\n          validator: \".opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/lib/deep-loop/post-dispatch-validate.ts#validateIterationOutputs\"\n          command: \"node .opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/scripts/verify-iteration.cjs --loop-type review --artifact-dir {artifact_dir} --iteration {current_iteration}\"\n          command_note: \"Mechanical leaf-reliability gate: exit 0 = complete; non-zero prints one machine reason (iteration_file_missing|iteration_verdict_missing|state_record_missing|route_proof_missing|route_proof_mismatch|delta_file_missing). The script enforces the artifact + route-proof contract instead of trusting the leaf to self-report, and a non-zero exit triggers on_failure.redispatch_once.\"\n          assert_exists: \"{state_paths.iteration_pattern}\"\n          assert_appended: \"{state_paths.state_log}\"\n          assert_jsonl_fields: [type, iteration, mode, run, status, focus, dimensions, filesReviewed, findingsCount, findingsSummary, findingsNew, findingDetails, newFindingsRatio, sessionId, generation, lineageMode, timestamp, durationMs]\n          route_proof:\n            mode: review\n            target_agent: deep-review\n            agent_definition_loaded: true\n            resolved_route: \"Resolved route: mode=review target_agent=deep-review\"\n          dispatchReceipt:\n            receiptDir: \"{state_paths.packet_dir}/dispatch-receipts\"\n            dispatchId: \"review-i{current_iteration}-g{generation}\"\n          assert_canonical_type: \"iteration\"\n          assert_delta_file_exists: \"{state_paths.delta_pattern}\"\n          assert_delta_file_has_iteration_record: true\n          failure_reasons:\n            - iteration_file_missing\n            - iteration_file_empty\n            - jsonl_not_appended\n            - jsonl_missing_fields\n            - jsonl_parse_error\n            - jsonl_wrong_type\n            - delta_file_missing\n            - delta_file_empty\n            - delta_file_missing_iteration_record\n            - executor_missing\n            - dispatch_failure_logged\n            - v2_missing_ledger\n            - v2_uncited_ledger_row\n            - v2_broken_linked_finding\n            - v2_shallow_finding_details\n            - delta_iteration_id_mismatch\n            - state_delta_iteration_mismatch\n            - route_proof_missing\n            - route_proof_mismatch\n          warning_surface:\n            source: \"result.warnings\"\n            action: \"emit schema_advisory canonical conflict event\"\n            severity: \"advisory\"\n            event_shape: '{\"type\":\"event\",\"event\":\"schema_advisory\",\"mode\":\"review\",\"iteration\":{current_iteration},\"warnings\":{result.warnings},\"severity\":\"advisory\",\"timestamp\":\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\"}'\n            note: \"Warnings do not fail dispatch. Hard failures still emit schema_mismatch through on_failure.\"\n          on_failure:\n            action: \"emit schema_mismatch canonical conflict event\"\n            redispatch_once: \"On the FIRST failure of the mechanical command check for this iteration, re-run step_dispatch_iteration exactly once for the same iteration number, then re-run the check. If it still fails, record the iteration as error (per step_evaluate_results.on_missing_outputs) and continue. Never re-dispatch a given iteration more than once.\"\n            escalation: \"After 3 consecutive failures across iterations, trigger stuck_recovery event with diagnostic context\"\n        record_executor_audit:\n          skip_when: \"config.executor.kind == 'native'\"\n          target: \"{state_paths.state_log}\"\n          field: \"executor\"\n          value:\n            kind: \"{config.executor.kind}\"\n            model: \"{config.executor.model}\"\n            reasoningEffort: \"{config.executor.reasoningEffort}\"\n            serviceTier: \"{config.executor.serviceTier}\"\n\n      step_evaluate_results:\n        action: \"Verify iteration outputs and extract metrics\"\n        verify:\n          - file_exists: \"{state_paths.iteration_pattern}\"\n          - jsonl_appended: \"New iteration record in state.jsonl\"\n          - strategy_updated: \"Strategy.md has been modified\"\n        extract:\n          - newFindingsRatio: \"From latest JSONL iteration record\"\n          - findings_count: \"From latest JSONL iteration record\"\n          - severity_counts: \"From latest JSONL iteration record (P0, P1, P2)\"\n          - dimensions: \"From latest JSONL iteration record\"\n          - files_reviewed: \"From latest JSONL iteration record\"\n          - status: \"From latest JSONL iteration record\"\n          - reviewed_artifacts: \"From latest JSONL iteration record\"\n          - traceability_checks: \"From latest JSONL iteration record when present\"\n        on_missing_outputs:\n          action: \"Mark iteration as 'error', continue to next\"\n          # Canonical iteration record: include sessionId, generation, durationMs so the reducer can persist\n          # the failure without dropping the iteration. Schema source: state_format.md §Iteration Records.\n          append_jsonl: '{\"type\":\"iteration\",\"iteration\":{current_iteration},\"run\":{current_iteration},\"mode\":\"review\",\"status\":\"error\",\"focus\":\"{next_dimension}\",\"dimensions\":[\"{next_dimension}\"],\"filesReviewed\":[],\"findingsCount\":0,\"findingsSummary\":{\"P0\":0,\"P1\":0,\"P2\":0},\"findingsNew\":{\"P0\":0,\"P1\":0,\"P2\":0},\"findingDetails\":[],\"traceabilityChecks\":{\"summary\":{\"required\":0,\"executed\":0,\"pass\":0,\"partial\":0,\"fail\":0,\"blocked\":0,\"notApplicable\":0,\"gatingFailures\":0},\"results\":[]},\"newFindingsRatio\":0.0,\"durationMs\":0,\"timestamp\":\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\",\"sessionId\":\"{config.lineage.sessionId}\",\"generation\":{config.lineage.generation},\"lineageMode\":\"{config.lineage.lineageMode}\"}'\n\n      step_post_iteration_claim_adjudication:\n        action: \"Validate typed claim-adjudication packets for any new P0/P1 findings and persist the result to state.jsonl so the next iteration's claimAdjudicationGate can read it\"\n        verify:\n          - typed_packets_present: \"Every new P0/P1 finding in review/iterations/iteration-{NNN}.md contains a claim-adjudication JSON block\"\n          - packet_fields: \"Each packet includes claim, evidenceRefs, counterevidenceSought, alternativeExplanation, finalSeverity, confidence, downgradeTrigger\"\n          - missing_packet_ids: \"List of new P0/P1 finding IDs that are missing a typed packet or field; empty array when all packets validate\"\n        on_pass:\n          set:\n            claim_adjudication_passed: true\n          append_jsonl: '{\"type\":\"event\",\"event\":\"claim_adjudication\",\"mode\":\"review\",\"run\":{current_iteration},\"passed\":true,\"activeP0P1\":{active_p0_p1_count},\"missingPackets\":[],\"timestamp\":\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\",\"sessionId\":\"{session_id}\",\"generation\":{generation}}'\n          log: \"Claim adjudication passed for iteration {current_iteration}. All new P0/P1 findings have typed packets.\"\n        on_fail:\n          action: \"Mark the iteration as invalid for convergence. The next iteration's claimAdjudicationGate (step_check_convergence step 0) reads the persisted `passed: false` event and vetoes STOP until a follow-up iteration rewrites the packets.\"\n          set:\n            claim_adjudication_passed: false\n          append_jsonl: '{\"type\":\"event\",\"event\":\"claim_adjudication\",\"mode\":\"review\",\"run\":{current_iteration},\"passed\":false,\"activeP0P1\":{active_p0_p1_count},\"missingPackets\":{missing_packet_ids},\"reason\":\"Missing typed packet fields for new P0/P1 findings\",\"timestamp\":\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\",\"sessionId\":\"{session_id}\",\"generation\":{generation}}'\n          log: \"Claim adjudication incomplete for new P0/P1 findings. Event persisted. The next iteration's step_check_convergence claim-adjudication pre-check will veto STOP while `passed: false` remains the latest event and active P0/P1 > 0.\"\n\n      step_reduce_review_state:\n        action: \"Run reducer to refresh the canonical findings registry before dashboard generation\"\n        command: \"node .opencode/skills/system-deep-loop/runtime/scripts/reduce-state.cjs {spec_folder}\"\n        read:\n          - \"{state_paths.state_log}\"\n          - \"{state_paths.iteration_pattern}\"\n          - \"{state_paths.findings_registry}\"\n          - \"{state_paths.strategy}\"\n        write:\n          - \"{state_paths.findings_registry}\"\n          - \"{state_paths.dashboard}\"\n          - \"{state_paths.strategy}\"\n        failure_modes:\n          malformed_delta: \"skip + warn\"\n          missing_iteration_file: \"no-op + error\"\n          schema_mismatch: \"reject + conflict event\"\n        guarantee: \"Idempotent for identical inputs\"\n        note: \"Reducer outputs findingsRegistry, dashboardMetrics, and strategyUpdates. Re-running the same inputs must be idempotent.\"\n\n      step_graph_upsert:","lineStart":634,"lineEnd":1400,"totalLines":1401,"truncated":true}},"title":".opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_review_auto.yaml","time":{"start":1783921249257,"end":1783921249268}},"metadata":{"openai":{"itemId":"fc_0d938a56916e5d01016a547a6109f88191a88fd6d185a3b077"}},"id":"prt_f59fe0b650014dBHVPDgwjwhAH","sessionID":"ses_0a6050609ffeLmwfdMHnBWCS8d","messageID":"msg_f59fda92e001P2748wV6Te35k9"}}

fi\\n883\\t            claude \\\\\\n884\\t              -p \\\"$(cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')\\\" \\\\\\n885\\t              --model \\\"{config.executor.model}\\\" \\\\\\n886\\t              --permission-mode acceptEdits \\\\\\n887\\t              --output-format text \\\\\\n888\\t              {optional_effort_flag}\\n889\\t          working_directory: \\\"{repo_root}\\\"\\n890\\t          timeout_seconds: \\\"{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}\\\"\\n891\\t          wait_for_completion: true\\n892\\t          render_hint:\\n893\\t            optional_claude_config_dir: |\\n894\\t              If config.executor.configDir is set and non-null, expand a leading ~ to HOME and bind that path.\\n895\\t              Otherwise expand to empty string.\\n896\\t            optional_effort_flag: |\\n897\\t              If config.executor.reasoningEffort is set and non-null, expand to: --effort {config.executor.reasoningEffort}\\n898\\t              Otherwise expand to empty string.\\n899\\t          notes:\\n900\\t            - \\\"claude-code default permission-mode is 'plan' (read-only); we override to 'acceptEdits' for iteration writes\\\"\\n901\\t            - \\\"config.executor.configDir maps to CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR for account-specific Claude Code routing\\\"\\n902\\t            - \\\"claude-code has no serviceTier flag\\\"\\n903\\t            - \\\"claude-code supports --effort for reasoning depth\\\"\\n904\\t        if_cli_opencode:\\n905\\t          command: |\\n906\\t            opencode run \\\\\\n907\\t              --model \\\"{config.executor.model}\\\" \\\\\\n908\\t              --format json \\\\\\n909\\t              --dangerously-skip-permissions \\\\\\n910\\t              --pure \\\\\\n911\\t              --dir \\\"{repo_root}\\\" \\\\\\n912\\t              {optional_variant_flag} \\\\\\n913\\t              \\\"$(printf '%s\\\\n\\\\n' 'Resolved route: mode=review; target_agent=@deep-review; execution=single_review_iteration; state_source=externalized_files; do_not_switch_mode=true'; cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')\\\" \\\\\\n914\\t              </dev/null\\n915\\t          working_directory: \\\"{repo_root}\\\"\\n916\\t          timeout_seconds: \\\"{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}\\\"\\n917\\t          wait_for_completion: true\\n918\\t          render_hint:\\n919\\t            optional_variant_flag: |\\n920\\t              If config.executor.reasoningEffort is set and non-null, expand to: --variant {config.executor.reasoningEffort}\\n921\\t              Otherwise expand to empty string.\\n922\\t          notes:\\n923\\t            - \\\"opencode run takes a positional message; prompt is fed via command substitution\\\"\\n924\\t            - \\\"--variant maps reasoningEffort to opencode's provider-specific reasoning lever (e.g., high, medium, minimal)\\\"\\n925\\t            - \\\"--dangerously-skip-permissions enables hands-off automation; sandboxMode='read-only' is not currently honored (no opencode equivalent)\\\"\\n926\\t            - \\\"cli-opencode self-invocation guard: this single-executor branch must only run from a non-OpenCode dispatch surface (Claude Code/raw shell). Explicit parallel-detached cli-opencode fan-out is handled by step_fanout_spawn_cli/fanout-run.cjs, not this branch. The cli-opencode skill SKILL.md §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate\\\"\\n927\\t            - \\\"</dev/null required: opencode v1.14.39 reads stdin at startup before session creation. Without explicit closed stdin, automation that redirects stdout/stderr hangs at 0% CPU after `+60s snapshot prune cleanup`. See cli-opencode SKILL.md §4 ALWAYS rule + memory feedback_opencode_run_requires_dev_null_stdin.md.\\\"\\n928\\t        post_dispatch_validate:\\n929\\t          validator: \\\".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/post-dispatch-validate.ts#validateIterationOutputs\\\"\\n930\\t          assert_exists: \\\"{state_paths.iteration_pattern}\\\"\\n931\\t          assert_appended: \\\"{state_paths.state_log}\\\"\\n932\\t          assert_jsonl_fields: [type, iteration, mode, run, status, focus, dimensions, filesReviewed, findingsCount, findingsSummary, findingsNew, findingDetails, newFindingsRatio, sessionId, generation, lineageMode, timestamp, durationMs, target_agent, agent_definition_loaded, resolved_route]\\n933\\t          route_proof:\\n934\\t            mode: review\\n935\\t            target_agent: deep-review\\n936\\t            agent_definition_loaded: true\\n937\\t            resolved_route: \\\"Resolved route: mode=review target_agent=deep-review\\\"\\n938\\t          assert_canonical_type: \\\"iteration\\\"\\n939\\t          assert_delta_file_exists: \\\"{state_paths.delta_pattern}\\\"\\n940\\t          assert_delta_file_has_iteration_record: true\\n941\\t          failure_reasons:\\n942\\t            - iteration_file_missing\\n943\\t            - iteration_file_empty\\n944\\t            - jsonl_not_appended\\n945\\t            - jsonl_missing_fields\\n946\\t            - jsonl_parse_error\\n947\\t            - jsonl_wrong_type\\n948\\t            - delta_file_missing\\n949\\t            - delta_file_empty\\n950\\t            - delta_file_missing_iteration_record\\n951\\t            - executor_missing\\n952\\t            - dispatch_failure_logged\\n953\\t            - v2_missing_ledger\\n954\\t            - v2_uncited_ledger_row\\n955\\t            - v2_broken_linked_finding\\n956\\t            - v2_shallow_finding_details\\n957\\t            - delta_iteration_id_mismatch\\n958\\t            - state_delta_iteration_mismatch\\n959\\t            - route_proof_missing\\n960\\t            - route_proof_mismatch\\n961\\t          warning_surface:\\n962\\t            source: \\\"result.warnings\\\"\\n963\\t            action: \\\"emit schema_advisory canonical conflict event\\\"\\n964\\t            severity: \\\"advisory\\\"\\n965\\t            event_shape: '{\\\"type\\\":\\\"event\\\",\\\"event\\\":\\\"schema_advisory\\\",\\\"mode\\\":\\\"review\\\",\\\"iteration\\\":{current_iteration},\\\"warnings\\\":{result.warnings},\\\"severity\\\":\\\"advisory\\\",\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\\\"}'\\n966\\t            note: \\\"Warnings do not fail dispatch. Hard failures still emit schema_mismatch through on_failure.\\\"\\n967\\t          on_failure:\\n968\\t            action: \\\"emit schema_mismatch canonical conflict event\\\"\\n969\\t            escalation: \\\"After 3 consecutive failures, trigger stuck_recovery event with diagnostic context\\\"\\n970\\t        record_executor_audit:\\n971\\t          skip_when: \\\"config.executor.kind == 'native'\\\"\\n972\\t          target: \\\"{state_paths.state_log}\\\"\\n973\\t          field: \\\"executor\\\"\\n974\\t          value:\\n975\\t            kind: \\\"{config.executor.kind}\\\"\\n976\\t            model: \\\"{config.executor.model}\\\"\\n977\\t            reasoningEffort: \\\"{config.executor.reasoningEffort}\\\"\\n978\\t            serviceTier: \\\"{config.executor.serviceTier}\\\"\\n979\\t\\n980\\t      step_evaluate_results:\\n981\\t        action: \\\"Verify iteration outputs and extract metrics\\\"\\n982\\t        verify:\\n983\\t          - file_exists: \\\"{state_paths.iteration_pattern}\\\"\\n984\\t          - jsonl_appended: \\\"New iteration record in state.jsonl\\\"\\n985\\t          - strategy_updated: \\\"Strategy.md has been modified\\\"\\n986\\t        extract:\\n987\\t          - newFindingsRatio: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n988\\t          - findings_count: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n989\\t          - severity_counts: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record (P0, P1, P2)\\\"\\n990\\t          - dimensions: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n991\\t          - files_reviewed: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n992\\t          - status: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n993\\t          - reviewed_artifacts: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n994\\t          - traceability_checks: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record when present\\\"\\n995\\t        on_missing_outputs:\\n996\\t          action: \\\"Mark iteration as 'error', continue to next\\\"\\n997\\t          # Canonical iteration record: include sessionId, generation, durationMs so the reducer can persist\\n998\\t          # the failure without dropping the iteration. Schema source: state_format.md §Iteration Records.\\n999\\t          append_jsonl: '{\\\"type\\\":\\\"iteration\\\",\\\"iteration\\\":{current_iteration},\\\"run\\\":{current_iteration},\\\"mode\\\":\\\"review\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"error\\\",\\\"focus\\\":\\\"{next_dimension}\\\",\\\"dimensions\\\":[\\\"{next_dimension}\\\"],\\\"filesReviewed\\\":[],\\\"findingsCount\\\":0,\\\"findingsSummary\\\":{\\\"P0\\\":0,\\\"P1\\\":0,\\\"P2\\\":0},\\\"findingsNew\\\":{\\\"P0\\\":0,\\\"P1\\\":0,\\\"P2\\\":0},\\\"findingDetails\\\":[],\\\"traceabilityChecks\\\":{\\\"summary\\\":{\\\"required\\\":0,\\\"executed\\\":0,\\\"pass\\\":0,\\\"partial\\\":0,\\\"fail\\\":0,\\\"blocked\\\":0,\\\"notApplicable\\\":0,\\\"gatingFailures\\\":0},\\\"results\\\":[]},\\\"newFindingsRatio\\\":0.0,\\\"durationMs\\\":0,\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\\\",\\\"sessionId\\\":\\\"{config.lineage.sessionId}\\\",\\\"generation\\\":{config.lineage.generation},\\\"lineageMode\\\":\\\"{config.lineage.lineageMode}\\\"}'\\n1000\\t\\n1001\\t      step_post_iteration_claim_adjudication:\\n1002\\t        action: \\\"Validate typed claim-adjudication packets for any new P0/P1 findings and persist the result to state.jsonl so the next iteration's claimAdjudicationGate can read it\\\"\\n1003\\t        verify:\\n1004\\t          - typed_packets_present: \\\"Every new P0/P1 finding in review/iterations/iteration-{NNN}.md contains a claim-adjudication JSON block\\\"\\n1005\\t          - packet_fields: \\\"Each packet includes claim, evidenceRefs, counterevidenceSought, alternativeExplanation, finalSeverity, confidence, downgradeTrigger\\\"\\n1006\\t          - missing_packet_ids: \\\"List of new P0/P1 finding IDs that are missing a typed packet or field; empty array when all packets validate\\\"\\n1007\\t        on_pass:\\n1008\\t          set:\\n1009\\t            claim_adjudication_passed: true\\n1010\\t          append_jsonl: '{\\\"type\\\":\\\"event\\\",\\\"event\\\":\\\"claim_adjudication\\\",\\\"mode\\\":\\\"review\\\",\\\"run\\\":{current_iteration},\\\"passed\\\":true,\\\"activeP0P1\\\":{active_p0_p1_count},\\\"missingPackets\\\":[],\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\\\",\\\"sessionId\\\":\\\"{session_id}\\\",\\\"generation\\\":{generation}}'\\n1011\\t          log: \\\"Claim adjudication passed for iteration {current_iteration}. All new P0/P1 findings have typed packets.\\\"\\n1012\\t        on_fail:\\n1013\\t          action: \\\"Mark the iteration as invalid for convergence. The next iteration's claimAdjudicationGate (step_check_convergence step 0) reads the persisted `passed: false` event and vetoes STOP until a follow-up iteration rewrites the packets.\\\"\\n1014\\t          set:\\n1015\\t            claim_adjudication_passed: false\\n1016\\t          append_jsonl: '{\\\"type\\\":\\\"event\\\",\\\"event\\\":\\\"claim_adjudication\\\",\\\"mode\\\":\\\"review\\\",\\\"run\\\":{current_iteration},\\\"passed\\\":false,\\\"activeP0P1\\\":{active_p0_p1_count},\\\"missingPackets\\\":{missing_packet_ids},\\\"reason\\\":\\\"Missing typed packet fields for new P0/P1 findings\\\",\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\\\",\\\"sessionId\\\":\\\"{session_id}\\\",\\\"generation\\\":{generation}}'\\n1017\\t          log: \\\"Claim adjudication incomplete for new P0/P1 findings. Event persisted. The next iteration's step_check_convergence claim-adjudication pre-check will veto STOP while `passed: false` remains the latest event and active P0/P1 > 0.\\\"\\n1018\\t\\n1019\\t      step_reduce_review_state:\\n1020\\t        action: \\\"Run reducer to refresh the canonical findings registry before dashboard generation\\\"\\n1021\\t        command: \\\"node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-review/scripts/reduce-state.cjs {spec_folder}\\\"\\n1022\\t        read:\\n1023\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.state_log}\\\"\\n1024\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.iteration_pattern}\\\"\\n1025\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.findings_registry}\\\"\\n1026\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.strategy}\\\"\\n1027\\t        write:\\n1028\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.findings_registry}\\\"\\n1029\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.dashboard}\\\"\\n1030\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.strategy}\\\"\\n1031\\t        failure_modes:\\n1032\\t          malformed_delta: \\\"skip + warn\\\"\\n1033\\t          missing_iteration_file: \\\"no-op + error\\\"\\n1034\\t          schema_mismatch: \\\"reject + conflict event\\\"\\n1035\\t        guarantee: \\\"Idempotent for identical inputs\\\"\\n1036\\t        note: \\\"Reducer outputs findingsRegistry, dashboardMetrics, and strategyUpdates. Re-running the same inputs must be idempotent.\\\"\\n1037\\t\\n1038\\t      step_graph_upsert:\\n1039\\t        action: \\\"Transform the latest iteration graphEvents delta into review graph nodes and edges, then upsert it\\\"\\n1040\\t        read:\\n1041\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.state_log}\\\"\\n1042\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.findings_registry}\\\"\\n1043\\t        transform: |\\n1044\\t          1. Read the latest iteration JSONL record after reducer completion.\\n1045\\t          2. If graphEvents is absent or empty, set graph_nodes_json = [] and graph_edges_json = [] and skip the upsert.\\n1046\\t          3. For each graph event without relation/source/target, normalize type = uppercase(event.type || event.nodeKind || event.type) and keep only DIMENSION, FILE, FINDING, EVIDENCE, REMEDIATION, BUG_CLASS, INVARIANT, PRODUCER, CONSUMER, TEST.\\n1047\\t          4. Emit nodes as { id, type, name, iteration, metadata } using the event label (or id fallback) and review metadata for run/current focus.\\n1048\\t          5.
