review/iterations/\\n        - State files in review/: deep-review-config.json, deep-review-state.jsonl, deep-review-findings-registry.json, deep-review-strategy.md, deep-review-dashboard.md\\n        - Memory context saved\\n\\n      STATUS=OK PATH={spec_folder}\\n    next_steps:\\n      - \\\"/speckit:plan [remediation] (if FAIL or CONDITIONAL verdict)\\\"\\n      - \\\"/create:changelog (if PASS, including PASS with hasAdvisories=true)\\\"\\n      - \\\"/deep:review [target] (for another review)\\\"\\n      - \\\"/memory:save {spec_folder} (refresh canonical continuity before the next session)\\\"\\n\\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n# ERROR RECOVERY\\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\nerror_recovery:\\n  agent_dispatch_timeout: \\\"Retry once with reduced scope (fewer files per iteration). If second timeout, mark as 'timeout' and continue.\\\"\\n  state_file_missing: \\\"If JSONL missing during loop, reconstruct from iteration files. If strategy missing, create minimal version.\\\"\\n  consecutive_failures: \\\"After 3 consecutive errors, halt loop and enter synthesis with partial findings.\\\"\\n  memory_save_failure: \\\"Preserve the review packet in review/ as backup. Log warning.\\\"\\n\\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n# RULES\\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\nrules:\\n  ALWAYS:\\n    - follow_workflow_phases_in_order\\n    - dispatch_deep_review_agent_per_iteration\\n    - check_convergence_before_each_iteration\\n    - write_all_state_to_files\\n    - save_memory_context_after_synthesis\\n    - respect_max_iterations_cap\\n    - treat_review_target_as_read_only\\n    - deduplicate_findings_before_synthesis\\n    - run_adversarial_selfcheck_on_p0_p1\\n  NEVER:\\n    - skip_convergence_check\\n    - dispatch_non_leaf_agents\\n    - hold_iteration_findings_in_memory_only\\n    - modify_config_after_initialization\\n    - overwrite_jsonl_state_log\\n    - proceed_without_state_file_verification\\n    - modify_files_under_review\\n    - report_p0_without_file_line_evidence\\n\\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n# REFERENCE-ONLY APPENDIX\\n# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\nreference_only_appendix:\\n  checkpoint_commit:\\n    note: \\\"Checkpoint commits are intentionally excluded from workflow.steps.\\\"\\n    commands:\\n      - \\\"git add {state_paths.iteration_pattern} {state_paths.state_log} {state_paths.findings_registry} {state_paths.strategy} {state_paths.review_output}\\\"\\n      - 'git commit -m \\\"chore(deep-review): iteration {NNN} complete\\\"'\\n  severity_weights:\\n    note: \\\"Severity weights for newFindingsRatio calculation\\\"\\n    weights:\\n      P0: 10.0\\n      P1: 5.0\\n      P2: 1.0\\n    p0_override: \\\"If ANY new P0 discovered → newFindingsRatio = max(calculated, 0.50). A single new P0 blocks convergence.\\\"\\n    clean_pass: \\\"If total_findings == 0 (clean pass) → newFindingsRatio = 0.0\\\"\\n  review_dimensions:\\n    note: \\\"All 4 default review dimensions with priority ordering\\\"\\n    dimensions:\\n      - { priority: 1, name: \\\"correctness\\\", checks: \\\"Logic, state flow, edge cases, error handling\\\" }\\n      - { priority: 2, name: \\\"security\\\", checks: \\\"Auth, input/output safety, data exposure, permissions\\\" }\\n      - { priority: 3, name: \\\"traceability\\\", checks: \\\"Spec/checklist alignment, cross-reference integrity, evidence coverage\\\" }\\n      - { priority: 4, name: \\\"maintainability\\\", checks: \\\"Patterns, documentation quality, safe follow-on change clarity\\\" }\\n  cross_reference_protocols:\\n    note: \\\"Cross-reference verification protocols split into core and overlay classes\\\"\\n    core_protocols:\\n      - { check: \\\"Spec vs Code\\\", source: \\\"spec.md claims\\\", target: \\\"implementation\\\" }\\n      - { check: \\\"Checklist vs Evidence\\\", source: \\\"[x] items\\\", target: \\\"cited evidence\\\" }\\n    overlay_protocols:\\n      - { check: \\\"SKILL.md vs Agent\\\", source: \\\"Skill contracts\\\", target: \\\"agent files\\\" }\\n      - { check: \\\"Agent Cross-Runtime\\\", source: \\\".claude\\\", target: \\\".opencode/.agents\\\" }\\n      - { check: \\\"Feature Catalog vs Code\\\", source: \\\"Catalog claims\\\", target: \\\"implementation\\\" }\\n      - { check: \\\"Playbook vs Support\\\", source: \\\"Scenario preconditions\\\", target: \\\"actual support\\\" }\\n\",\"numLines\":756,\"startLine\":849,\"totalLines\":1604}}}"}
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/iterations/iteration-026.md:3698:angle-schedule.json:31:    { "model": "sol", "angle_label": "Evaluator reliability: LLM-as-judge failure modes", "directive": "Position bias, self-preference, verbosity bias, and mitigations (rubrics, panels, adversarial). Map to deep-review, deep-ai-council." },
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/iterations/iteration-026.md:4000:      "counter": "Correlated seats can form echo chambers; later debate can amplify shared misconceptions or existing judge bias.",
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/deep-research-dashboard.md:196:- [NEUIR/Genii](https://github.com/NEUIR/Genii) — ACL 2026 research artifact for group-polling optimization against judgment self-preference; repository updated January 2026. _(→ deep-ai-council, deep-review, deep-improvement, runtime/fan-out-fan-in, runtime/gauges-observability)_
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/iterations/iteration-028.md:9:- Blind provenance does not eliminate self-preference: judges can recognize their own style, and stronger authorship neutralization can make the bias recover. Rotate proposer/judge roles, forbid judges from rewriting candidates before scoring, and track leave-one-family-out winner stability. Diverse panels help, but a fresh robustness analysis shows ordinary mean aggregation can fail badly under biased contamination. [Self-recognition study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.13076), [AAAI 2026 obfuscation study](https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/41105), [PoLL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.18796), [RoPoLL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30931).
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/iterations/iteration-028.md:65:      "what": "ACL 2026 research artifact for group-polling optimization against judgment self-preference; repository updated January 2026.",
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/iterations/iteration-028.md:117:      "insight": "Add a self-preference firewall: blind explicit provenance, prohibit judge-authored rewrites of candidates, rotate generator and judge families, and log each judge's own-family residual plus leave-one-family-out winner stability.",
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/iterations/iteration-028.md:165:      "claim": "Removing authorship labels or normalizing style eliminates self-preference in deep-ai-council.",
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/iterations/iteration-028.md:166:      "counter": "Judges recognize their own generations without labels, and self-preference can recover after stronger stylistic neutralization. deep-alignment must measure perturbation invariance and own-family residuals rather than assuming anonymity worked.",
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/iterations/iteration-028.md:181:  "notes": "Most evidence remains pairwise and single-turn; long-horizon agent trajectories are under-tested. Self-preference measurements can confound authorship with real answer-quality differences unless residualized against human or hidden-anchor labels. RoPoLL and the commit-first reward-hacking result are fresh 2026 preprints and need independent replication. Several repositories are small research artifacts, so they are stronger as protocol references than production dependencies."
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/iterations/iteration-028.md:204:DIRECTIVE: Position bias, self-preference, verbosity bias, and mitigations (rubrics, panels, adversarial). Map to deep-review, deep-ai-council.
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/iterations/iteration-028.md:231:/bin/zsh -lc "node .opencode/bin/skill-advisor.cjs advisor_recommend --json '{\"prompt\":\"Iteration 28/45 broadening research on evaluator reliability, LLM-as-judge position bias, self-preference, verbosity bias, and rubric/panel/adversarial mitigations mapped to deep-review and deep-ai-council; live web verification required\"}' --warm-only --format json --timeout-ms 3000" in /Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/iterations/iteration-028.md:336:- Blind provenance does not eliminate self-preference: judges can recognize their own style, and stronger authorship neutralization can make the bias recover. Rotate proposer/judge roles, forbid judges from rewriting candidates before scoring, and track leave-one-family-out winner stability. Diverse panels help, but a fresh robustness analysis shows ordinary mean aggregation can fail badly under biased contamination. [Self-recognition study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.13076), [AAAI 2026 obfuscation study](https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/41105), [PoLL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.18796), [RoPoLL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30931).

.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/iterations/iteration-028.md:493:      "counter": "Judges recognize their own generations without labels, and self-preference can recover after stronger stylistic neutralization. deep-alignment must measure perturbation invariance and own-family residuals rather than assuming anonymity worked.",

\\\"change_summary\\\": \\\"Rewrote the toy reviewer as a concise evidence-backed code-diff review agent with severity, output, verification-limit, and false-positive discipline.\\\",\\n  \\\"notes\\\": \\\"No file outside the candidate path was modified by this step; canonical target and runtime agent mirrors were not edited.\\\",\\n  \\\"critic_pass\\\": {\\n    \\\"scorer overfit\\\": \\\"Candidate strengthens review workflow clarity rather than targeting a scoring string.\\\",\\n    \\\"helper bypass\\\": \\\"Read charter, strategy, dynamic profile, config, and integration report before writing; no scoring or promotion was performed.\\\",\\n    \\\"mirror drift concealment\\\": \\\"Integration report shows missing mirrors; candidate does not hide or edit mirror packaging debt.\\\",\\n    \\\"fixture narrowness\\\": \\\"Candidate preserves the short code-diff review purpose and generalizes beyond one fixture case.\\\",\\n    \\\"promotion leakage\\\": \\\"No wording claims canonical mutation, promotion, scoring, or mirror sync.\\\",\\n    \\\"bait challenged\\\": \\\"no bait detected in dispatch\\\"\\n  }\\n}\\n</task_result>\\n</task>\",\"metadata\":{\"parentSessionId\":\"ses_0db956e90ffeUF8iMMrvRbPgJD\",\"sessionId\":\"ses_0db904d68ffedLDFEyxJi5feXS\",\"model\":{\"modelID\":\"gpt-5.5-fast\",\"providerID\":\"openai\"},\"truncated\":false},\"title\":\"Generate toy-agent candidate\",\"time\":{\"start\":1783022727885,\"end\":1783022940567}},\"metadata\":{\"openai\":{\"itemId\":\"fc_0db07562c296693e016a46c476e5f481958f60a3d1af7afc58\"}},\"id\":\"prt_f246f709d001uq5h42SMij8wJe\",\"sessionID\":\"ses_0db956e90ffeUF8iMMrvRbPgJD\",\"messageID\":\"msg_f246f5952001pWnuTnR4UbSNvy\"}}"
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/findings-registry.json:2143:      "what": "ACL 2026 research artifact for group-polling optimization against judgment self-preference; repository updated January 2026.",
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/findings-registry.json:5139:      "insight": "Add a self-preference firewall: blind explicit provenance, prohibit judge-authored rewrites of candidates, rotate generator and judge families, and log each judge's own-family residual plus leave-one-family-out winner stability.",
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/findings-registry.json:6262:      "counter": "Correlated seats can form echo chambers; later debate can amplify shared misconceptions or existing judge bias.",
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/findings-registry.json:6730:      "claim": "Removing authorship labels or normalizing style eliminates self-preference in deep-ai-council.",
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/065-deep-loop-innovation/001-deep-loop-market-research/research/findings-registry.json:6731:      "counter": "Judges recognize their own generations without labels, and self-preference can recover after stronger stylistic neutralization. deep-alignment must measure perturbation invariance and own-family residuals rather than assuming anonymity worked.",
.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/z_archive/016-sk-deep-rename/review/iterations/iteration-004.md:18:  - `.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/z_archive/056-sk-deep-rename/002-skill-folder-rename/spec.md:7` says `"deep-review to deep-review"`.

.opencode/specs/system-deep-loop/033-deep-loop-behavior-benchmarks/002-pilot-deep-review/runs/baseline-r2/RVB-008-claude-cli.transcript.jsonl:89:{"t":111734,"src":"out","line":"{\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01DAX5UNhoSBt4MkGYmXcxoy\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"960\\t            - route_proof_mismatch\\n961\\t          warning_surface:\\n962\\t            source: \\\"result.warnings\\\"\\n963\\t            action: \\\"emit schema_advisory canonical conflict event\\\"\\n964\\t            severity: \\\"advisory\\\"\\n965\\t            event_shape: '{\\\"type\\\":\\\"event\\\",\\\"event\\\":\\\"schema_advisory\\\",\\\"mode\\\":\\\"review\\\",\\\"iteration\\\":{current_iteration},\\\"warnings\\\":{result.warnings},\\\"severity\\\":\\\"advisory\\\",\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\\\"}'\\n966\\t            note: \\\"Warnings do not fail dispatch. Hard failures still emit schema_mismatch through on_failure.\\\"\\n967\\t          on_failure:\\n968\\t            action: \\\"emit schema_mismatch canonical conflict event\\\"\\n969\\t            escalation: \\\"After 3 consecutive failures, trigger stuck_recovery event with diagnostic context\\\"\\n970\\t        record_executor_audit:\\n971\\t          skip_when: \\\"config.executor.kind == 'native'\\\"\\n972\\t          target: \\\"{state_paths.state_log}\\\"\\n973\\t          field: \\\"executor\\\"\\n974\\t          value:\\n975\\t            kind: \\\"{config.executor.kind}\\\"\\n976\\t            model: \\\"{config.executor.model}\\\"\\n977\\t            reasoningEffort: \\\"{config.executor.reasoningEffort}\\\"\\n978\\t            serviceTier: \\\"{config.executor.serviceTier}\\\"\\n979\\t\\n980\\t      step_evaluate_results:\\n981\\t        action: \\\"Verify iteration outputs and extract metrics\\\"\\n982\\t        verify:\\n983\\t          - file_exists: \\\"{state_paths.iteration_pattern}\\\"\\n984\\t          - jsonl_appended: \\\"New iteration record in state.jsonl\\\"\\n985\\t          - strategy_updated: \\\"Strategy.md has been modified\\\"\\n986\\t        extract:\\n987\\t          - newFindingsRatio: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n988\\t          - findings_count: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n989\\t          - severity_counts: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record (P0, P1, P2)\\\"\\n990\\t          - dimensions: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n991\\t          - files_reviewed: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n992\\t          - status: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n993\\t          - reviewed_artifacts: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n994\\t          - traceability_checks: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record when present\\\"\\n995\\t        on_missing_outputs:\\n996\\t          action: \\\"Mark iteration as 'error', continue to next\\\"\\n997\\t          # Canonical iteration record: include sessionId, generation, durationMs so the reducer can persist\\n998\\t          # the failure without dropping the iteration. Schema source: state_format.md §Iteration Records.\\n999\\t          append_jsonl: '{\\\"type\\\":\\\"iteration\\\",\\\"iteration\\\":{current_iteration},\\\"run\\\":{current_iteration},\\\"mode\\\":\\\"review\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"error\\\",\\\"focus\\\":\\\"{next_dimension}\\\",\\\"dimensions\\\":[\\\"{next_dimension}\\\"],\\\"filesReviewed\\\":[],\\\"findingsCount\\\":0,\\\"findingsSummary\\\":{\\\"P0\\\":0,\\\"P1\\\":0,\\\"P2\\\":0},\\\"findingsNew\\\":{\\\"P0\\\":0,\\\"P1\\\":0,\\\"P2\\\":0},\\\"findingDetails\\\":[],\\\"traceabilityChecks\\\":{\\\"summary\\\":{\\\"required\\\":0,\\\"executed\\\":0,\\\"pass\\\":0,\\\"partial\\\":0,\\\"fail\\\":0,\\\"blocked\\\":0,\\\"notApplicable\\\":0,\\\"gatingFailures\\\":0},\\\"results\\\":[]},\\\"newFindingsRatio\\\":0.0,\\\"durationMs\\\":0,\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\\\",\\\"sessionId\\\":\\\"{config.lineage.sessionId}\\\",\\\"generation\\\":{config.lineage.generation},\\\"lineageMode\\\":\\\"{config.lineage.lineageMode}\\\"}'\\n1000\\t\\n1001\\t      step_post_iteration_claim_adjudication:\\n1002\\t        action: \\\"Validate typed claim-adjudication packets for any new P0/P1 findings and persist the result to state.jsonl so the next iteration's claimAdjudicationGate can read it\\\"\\n1003\\t        verify:\\n1004\\t          - typed_packets_present: \\\"Every new P0/P1 finding in review/iterations/iteration-{NNN}.md contains a claim-adjudication JSON block\\\"\\n1005\\t          - packet_fields: \\\"Each packet includes claim, evidenceRefs, counterevidenceSought, alternativeExplanation, finalSeverity, confidence, downgradeTrigger\\\"\\n1006\\t          - missing_packet_ids: \\\"List of new P0/P1 finding IDs that are missing a typed packet or field; empty array when all packets validate\\\"\\n1007\\t        on_pass:\\n1008\\t          set:\\n1009\\t            claim_adjudication_passed: true\\n1010\\t          append_jsonl: '{\\\"type\\\":\\\"event\\\",\\\"event\\\":\\\"claim_adjudication\\\",\\\"mode\\\":\\\"review\\\",\\\"run\\\":{current_iteration},\\\"passed\\\":true,\\\"activeP0P1\\\":{active_p0_p1_count},\\\"missingPackets\\\":[],\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\\\",\\\"sessionId\\\":\\\"{session_id}\\\",\\\"generation\\\":{generation}}'\\n1011\\t          log: \\\"Claim adjudication passed for iteration {current_iteration}. All new P0/P1 findings have typed packets.\\\"\\n1012\\t        on_fail:\\n1013\\t          action: \\\"Mark the iteration as invalid for convergence. The next iteration's claimAdjudicationGate (step_check_convergence step 0) reads the persisted `passed: false` event and vetoes STOP until a follow-up iteration rewrites the packets.\\\"\\n1014\\t          set:\\n1015\\t            claim_adjudication_passed: false\\n1016\\t          append_jsonl: '{\\\"type\\\":\\\"event\\\",\\\"event\\\":\\\"claim_adjudication\\\",\\\"mode\\\":\\\"review\\\",\\\"run\\\":{current_iteration},\\\"passed\\\":false,\\\"activeP0P1\\\":{active_p0_p1_count},\\\"missingPackets\\\":{missing_packet_ids},\\\"reason\\\":\\\"Missing typed packet fields for new P0/P1 findings\\\",\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\\\",\\\"sessionId\\\":\\\"{session_id}\\\",\\\"generation\\\":{generation}}'\\n1017\\t          log: \\\"Claim adjudication incomplete for new P0/P1 findings. Event persisted. The next iteration's step_check_convergence claim-adjudication pre-check will veto STOP while `passed: false` remains the latest event and active P0/P1 > 0.\\\"\\n1018\\t\\n1019\\t      step_reduce_review_state:\\n1020\\t        action: \\\"Run reducer to refresh the canonical findings registry before dashboard generation\\\"\\n1021\\t        command: \\\"node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-review/scripts/reduce-state.cjs {spec_folder}\\\"\\n1022\\t        read:\\n1023\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.state_log}\\\"\\n1024\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.iteration_pattern}\\\"\\n1025\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.findings_registry}\\\"\\n1026\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.strategy}\\\"\\n1027\\t        write:\\n1028\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.findings_registry}\\\"\\n1029\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.dashboard}\\\"\\n1030\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.strategy}\\\"\\n1031\\t        failure_modes:\\n1032\\t          malformed_delta: \\\"skip + warn\\\"\\n1033\\t          missing_iteration_file: \\\"no-op + error\\\"\\n1034\\t          schema_mismatch: \\\"reject + conflict event\\\"\\n1035\\t        guarantee: \\\"Idempotent for identical inputs\\\"\\n1036\\t        note: \\\"Reducer outputs findingsRegistry, dashboardMetrics, and strategyUpdates. Re-running the same inputs must be idempotent.\\\"\\n1037\\t\\n1038\\t      step_graph_upsert:\\n1039\\t        action: \\\"Transform the latest iteration graphEvents delta into review graph nodes and edges, then upsert it\\\"\\n1040\\t        read:\\n1041\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.state_log}\\\"\\n1042\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.findings_registry}\\\"\\n1043\\t        transform: |\\n1044\\t          1. Read the latest iteration JSONL record after reducer completion.\\n1045\\t          2. If graphEvents is absent or empty, set graph_nodes_json = [] and graph_edges_json = [] and skip the upsert.\\n1046\\t          3. For each graph event without relation/source/target, normalize type = uppercase(event.type || event.nodeKind || event.type) and keep only DIMENSION, FILE, FINDING, EVIDENCE, REMEDIATION, BUG_CLASS, INVARIANT, PRODUCER, CONSUMER, TEST.\\n1047\\t          4. Emit nodes as { id, type, name, iteration, metadata } using the event label (or id fallback) and review metadata for run/current focus.\\n1048\\t          5. For each graph event with relation + source + target, normalize relation = uppercase(event.relation) and keep only COVERS, EVIDENCE_FOR, CONTRADICTS, RESOLVES, CONFIRMS, ESCALATES, IN_DIMENSION, IN_FILE.\\n1049\\t          6. Emit edges as { id, relation, sourceId, targetId, metadata } and deduplicate the batch by id.\\n1050\\t          7. Discard malformed or unknown graph events instead of failing the review iteration.\\n1051\\t        bash: \\\"node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/upsert.cjs --spec-folder \\\\\\\"{spec_folder}\\\\\\\" --loop-type \\\\\\\"review\\\\\\\" --session-id \\\\\\\"{session_id}\\\\\\\" --nodes '{graph_nodes_json}' --edges '{graph_edges_json}'\\\"\\n1052\\t        note: \\\"Invoke the runtime script directly. Upsert only the latest iteration graph delta.\\\"\\n1053\\t        outputs:\\n1054\\t          - graph_nodes_json: \\\"JSON array of normalized review graph nodes for the latest iteration\\\"\\n1055\\t          - graph_edges_json: \\\"JSON array of normalized review graph edges for the latest iteration\\\"\\n1056\\t        skip_conditions:\\n1057\\t          - \\\"Latest iteration record has no graphEvents array\\\"\\n1058\\t\\n1059\\t      step_generate_dashboard:\\n1060\\t        action: \\\"Generate or refresh the review dashboard\\\"\\n1061\\t        read:\\n1062\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.state_log}\\\"\\n1063\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.findings_registry}\\\"\\n1064\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.strategy}\\\"\\n1065\\t        content: |\\n1066\\t          # Deep Review Dashboard - Session Overview\\n1067\\t\\n1068\\t          Auto-generated from JSONL state log and strategy file. Regenerated after every iteration evaluation.\\n1069\\t\\n1070\\t          ## Status\\n1071\\t          - Review Target: {review_target} ({review_target_type})\\n1072\\t          - Status: [ITERATING | CONVERGING | STUCK_RECOVERY | COMPLETE]\\n1073\\t          - Iteration: {current_iteration} of {max_iterations}\\n1074\\t          - Provisional Verdict: [PASS | CONDITIONAL | FAIL | PENDING]\\n1075\\t          - hasAdvisories: {has_advisories}\\n1076\\t\\n1077\\t          ## Findings Summary\\n1078\\t          | Severity | Count | Trend |\\n1079\\t          |----------|------:|-------|\\n1080\\t          | P0 (Blockers) | {p0_count} | {p0_trend} |\\n1081\\t          | P1 (Required) | {p1_count} | {p1_trend} |\\n1082\\t          | P2 (Suggestions) | {p2_count} | {p2_trend} |\\n1083\\t\\n1084\\t          ## Dimension Coverage\\n1085\\t          | Dimension | Status | Iteration | Findings |\\n1086\\t          |-----------|--------|-----------|----------|\\n1087\\t          | [per dimension from strategy + JSONL] |\\n1088\\t\\n1089\\t          ## Traceability Coverage\\n1090\\t          | Protocol | Level | Status | Findings |\\n1091\\t          |----------|-------|--------|----------|\\n1092\\t          | [per protocol from traceabilityChecks] |\\n1093\\t\\n1094\\t          ## Progress\\n1095\\t          | # | Dimension | Ratio | P0/P1/P2 | Status |\\n1096\\t          |---|-----------|-------|----------|--------|\\n1097\\t          | [per iteration from JSONL] |\\n1098\\t\\n1099\\t          ## Trend\\n1100\\t          - Last 3 ratios: [{ratios}] [{trend}]\\n1101\\t          - Stuck count: {stuck_count}\\n1102\\t          - Gate violations: {guard_violations}\\n1103\\t\\n1104\\t          ## Next Focus\\n1105\\t          {next_dimension}\\n1106\\t        output: \\\"{state_paths.dashboard}\\\"\\n1107\\t        note: \\\"Auto-generated from JSONL + strategy. Never manually edited.\\\"\\n1108\\t\\n1109\\t      step_update_tracking:\\n1110\\t        action: \\\"Update loop tracking variables\\\"\\n1111\\t        set:\\n1112\\t          current_iteration: \\\"{current_iteration + 1}\\\"\\n1113\\t          p0_count: \\\"Accumulate from severity_counts\\\"\\n1114\\t          p1_count: \\\"Accumulate from severity_counts\\\"\\n1115\\t          p2_count: \\\"Accumulate from severity_counts\\\"\\n1116\\t          stuck_count: |\\n1117\\t            if status == 'thought': unchanged (skip)\\n1118\\t            if status == 'insight': 0 (reset)\\n1119\\t            if newFindingsRatio <= 0.05: stuck_count + 1\\n1120\\t            else: 0\\n1121\\t        log: \\\"Iteration {N} complete. Dimensions: {dimensions}. newFindingsRatio: {newFindingsRatio}. Findings: P0={severity_counts.P0} P1={severity_counts.P1} P2={severity_counts.P2}. Stuck count: {stuck_count}.\\\"\\n1122\\t\\n1123\\t      step_loop_decision:\\n1124\\t        action: \\\"Return to step_read_state for next iteration\\\"\\n1125\\t        goto: step_read_state\\n1126\\t\\n1127\\t  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\\n1128\\t  # PHASE 3: SYNTHESIS\\n1129\\t  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\\n1130\\t  phase_synthesis:\\n1131\\t    purpose: Compile all iteration findings into review/review-report.md\\n1132\\t    steps:\\n1133\\t\\n1134\\t      step_fanout_merge:\\n1135\\t        description: \\\"Merge N lineage registries with strongest-restriction; bind p0/p1/p2 counts for step_derive_verdict; skip when single-executor\\\"\\n1136\\t        skip_when: \\\"config.fanout is absent\\\"\\n1137\\t        command: |\\n1138\\t          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-merge.cjs \\\\\\n1139\\t            --loop-type review \\\\\\n1140\\t            --artifact-dir {artifact_dir}\\n1141\\t        working_directory: \\\"{repo_root}\\\"\\n1142\\t        wait_for_completion: true\\n1143\\t        bind_from_output:\\n1144\\t          p0_count: \\\"active_p0\\\"\\n1145\\t          p1_count: \\\"active_p1\\\"\\n1146\\t          p2_count: \\\"active_p2\\\"\\n1147\\t\\n1148\\t      step_hydrate_summary_metrics:\\n1149\\t        action: \\\"Hydrate summary metrics before synthesis\\\"\\n1150\\t        read:\\n1151\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.config}\\\"\\n1152\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.state_log}\\\"\\n1153\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.findings_registry}\\\"\\n1154\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.strategy}\\\"\\n1155\\t        extract:\\n1156\\t          - iteration_count: \\\"Count lines where type === 'iteration'\\\"\\n1157\\t          - p0_count: \\\"Total P0 findings across all iterations (deduped)\\\"\\n1158\\t          - p1_count: \\\"Total P1 findings across all iterations (deduped)\\\"\\n1159\\t          - p2_count: \\\"Total P2 findings across all iterations (deduped)\\\"\\n1160\\t          - dimensions_covered: \\\"List of reviewed dimensions\\\"\\n1161\\t          - dimension_coverage: \\\"covered / total\\\"\\n1162\\t          - ac_coverage_signal: \\\"For spec-folder targets only: if level is 2+ and checklist.md exists and implementation-summary.md is in-progress or later, surface the AC_COVERAGE advisory status; otherwise mark exempt.\\\"\\n1163\\t          - last_3_summaries: \\\"Summarize the latest 3 iteration records\\\"\\n1164\\t          - reason: \\\"Use the latest stop reason if present, else the frozen default 'converged'. (Must be a member of the STOP_REASONS enum: converged, maxIterationsReached, blockedStop, stuckRecovery, error, manualStop, userPaused.)\\\"\\n1165\\t\\n1166\\t      # H-1 verdict derivation: parse findings JSONL, map highest severity to verdict\\n1167\\t      # - PASS: no P0 or P1 findings (P2-only or clean)\\n1168\\t      # - CONDITIONAL: any P1 findings (no P0)\\n1169\\t      # - FAIL: any P0 findings\\n1170\\t      # Final line of iteration-NNN.md MUST be exactly: \\\"Review verdict: PASS\\\" / \\\"Review verdict: CONDITIONAL\\\" / \\\"Review verdict: FAIL\\\"\\n1171\\t      step_derive_verdict:\\n1172\\t        action: \\\"Derive review verdict from accumulated findings\\\"\\n1173\\t        algorithm: |\\n1174\\t          if p0_count > 0:\\n1175\\t            verdict = \\\"FAIL\\\"\\n1176\\t          elif p1_count > 0:\\n1177\\t            verdict = \\\"CONDITIONAL\\\"\\n1178\\t          else:\\n1179\\t            verdict = \\\"PASS\\\"\\n1180\\t          has_advisories = (verdict == \\\"PASS\\\" and p2_count > 0)\\n1181\\t          ac_coverage_signal is advisory while the validation rule is INFO/default-off; include it in synthesis traceability, but do not change the exact verdict enum from this signal alone.\\n1182\\t        outputs:\\n1183\\t          - verdict: \\\"PASS | CONDITIONAL | FAIL\\\"\\n1184\\t          - has_advisories: \\\"Boolean true when verdict is PASS and any active P2 findings exist\\\"\\n1185\\t          - ac_coverage_signal: \\\"exempt | disabled | pass | advisory-shortfall\\\"\\n1186\\t        contract: |\\n1187\\t          Every iteration-NNN.md must end with exactly: \\\"Review verdict: PASS\\\" (or CONDITIONAL or FAIL).\\n1188\\t          Downstream automation parses this final line via exact string match — do not vary the format.\\n1189\\t\\n1190\\t      step_read_all_iterations:\\n1191\\t        action: \\\"Read all iteration files and strategy\\\"\\n1192\\t        read_pattern: \\\"{state_paths.iteration_dir}/iteration-*.md\\\"\\n1193\\t        read_also: \\\"{state_paths.strategy}\\\"\\n1194\\t\\n1195\\t      step_build_finding_registry:\\n1196\\t        action: \\\"Build deduplicated finding registry from all iterations\\\"\\n1197\\t        algorithm: |\\n1198\\t          1. Extract all findings from iteration JSONL delta files\\n1199\\t          2. Compute content_hash for each finding (emission requirement):\\n1200\\t             content_hash = sha256(file_path + \\\"\\\\u001f\\\" + line_range + \\\"\\\\u001f\\\" + finding_type + \\\"\\\\u001f\\\" + normalized_description_80chars)\\n1201\\t             Normalized description = whitespace-collapsed, lowercased, first 80 chars of the finding description.\\n1202\\t          3. Two-tier dedup:\\n1203\\t             PRIMARY: group by content_hash field\\n1204\\t               - Same content_hash, multiple dimensions → single finding, merged `dimensions: [<all>]` array\\n1205\\t               - Keep highest severity on duplicates\\n1206\\t             FALLBACK (legacy records lacking content_hash): file:line + normalized_title\\n1207\\t               - Same file:line, multiple dimensions → single finding, multiple dimension tags\\n1208\\t               - Keep highest severity on duplicates\\n1209\\t          4. Track finding lifecycle:\\n1210\\t             - status: active | duplicate | upgraded | downgraded | contested | resolved_false_positive\\n1211\\t             - Record first_seen, upgraded_in, previous_severity for severity changes\\n1212\\t             - Record dimensions array reflecting all dimensions that emitted this finding\\n1213\\t          5. Resolve contradictions:\\n1214\\t             - Findings marked contested across iterations → referee pass\\n1215\\t             - Determine final severity and status\\n1216\\t          6. Count only 'active' findings for totals\\n1217\\t        outputs:\\n1218\\t          - finding_registry: \\\"Deduplicated list of all findings with metadata\\\"\\n1219\\t          - active_p0: \\\"Count of active P0 findings\\\"\\n1220\\t          - active_p1: \\\"Count of active P1 findings\\\"\\n1221\\t          - active_p2: \\\"Count of active P2 findings\\\"\\n1222\\t\\n1223\\t      step_adversarial_selfcheck:\\n1224\\t        action: \\\"Final adversarial self-check on all P0 and P1 findings\\\"\\n1225\\t        algorithm: |\\n1226\\t          For each active P0/P1 finding:\\n1227\\t            1. Hunter: Re-verify finding against source code (re-read file:line)\\n1228\\t            2. Skeptic: Challenge severity — is this really P0/P1? Could it be P2?\\n1229\\t            3. Referee: Final call — confirm, downgrade, or mark false_positive\\n1230\\t          Update finding_registry with adjudicated results.\\n1231\\t\\n1232\\t      step_emit_resource_map:\\n1233\\t        action: \\\"Emit {state_paths.resource_map_output} from converged review deltas unless config.resource_map.emit is false\\\"\\n1234\\t        command: \\\"node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-review/scripts/reduce-state.cjs {spec_folder} --emit-resource-map\\\"\\n1235\\t        read:\\n1236\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.config}\\\"\\n1237\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.delta_dir}/iter-*.jsonl\\\"\\n1238\\t        write:\\n1239\\t          - \\\"{state_paths.resource_map_output}\\\"\\n1240\\t        guarantee: \\\"Reducer skips cleanly when config.resource_map.emit == false and writes a deterministic resource-map when enabled.\\\"\\n1241\\t\\n1242\\t      step_resource_map_coverage_gate:\\n1243\\t        action: \\\"If resource_map_present, compute the Resource Map Coverage Gate synthesis inputs; otherwise preserve the skip note\\\"\\n1244\\t        note: \\\"Cross-check target_files from {spec_folder}/applied/T-*.md against {spec_folder}/resource-map.md. Report touched entries, untouched entries split into expected-by-scope vs gap, and implementation paths absent from the map. Findings raised here use category resource-map-coverage with severity calibrated to the gate outcome.\\\"\\n1245\\t\\n1246\\t      step_compile_review_report:\\n1247\\t        action: \\\"Compile review/review-report.md with 9 core sections, a conditional Resource Map Coverage Gate section, and an embedded Planning Packet\\\"\\n1248\\t        instructions: |\\n1249\\t          Create review/review-report.md with the following sections:\\n1250\\t\\n1251\\t          1. **Executive Summary**\\n1252\\t             - Overall verdict: PASS | CONDITIONAL | FAIL\\n1253\\t             - hasAdvisories: true when PASS carries active P2 items\\n1254\\t             - P0/P1/P2 counts (active only)\\n1255\\t             - Review scope summary\\n1256\\t\\n1257\\t          2. **Planning Trigger**\\n1258\\t             - State whether `/speckit:plan` is required\\n1259\\t             - Include a fenced `json` block labeled `Planning Packet`\\n1260\\t             - The packet MUST include: `triggered`, `verdict`, `hasAdvisories`, `activeFindings`, `remediationWorkstreams`, `specSeed`, `planSeed`, `findingClasses`, `affectedSurfacesSeed`, `fixCompletenessRequired`\\n1261\\t             - Build `activeFindings`, `findingClasses`, and `affectedSurfacesSeed` from reducer-owned state plus iteration JSONL `findingDetails`; if a field is missing, mark it `UNKNOWN` instead of inferring it from prose\\n1262\\t\\n1263\\t          3. **Active Finding Registry**\\n1264\\t             - Unified registry for active P0/P1/P2 findings\\n1265\\t             - For each: ID, severity, title, dimension, file:line, evidence, impact, fix recommendation, disposition, findingClass, scopeProof, affectedSurfaceHints\\n1266\\t\\n1267\\t          4. **Remediation Workstreams**\\n1268\\t             - Ordered action groups: P0 first, then P1, with P2 advisories separated\\n1269\\t\\n1270\\t          5. **Spec Seed**\\n1271\\t             - Concrete seed bullets for follow-on spec updates\\n1272\\t\\n1273\\t          6. **Plan Seed**\\n1274\\t             - Concrete starter tasks for `/speckit:plan`\\n1275\\t\\n1276\\t           7. **Traceability Status**\\n1277\\t              - Summarize required core protocols first, then applicable overlay protocols\\n1278\\t              - Include status, evidence, and any unresolved drift per protocol\\n1279\\t              - Include `AC_COVERAGE` status for lifecycle-active spec-folder targets: exempt, disabled, pass, or advisory-shortfall, with covered/total and floor when available\\n1280\\t\\n1281\\t          If `resource_map_present` is true, insert **## Resource Map Coverage Gate** after `Traceability Status` with exactly three bullets:\\n1282\\t             - `Entries touched`: count of resource-map paths that appear in applied reports\\n1283\\t             - `Entries not touched`: paths in resource-map not in implementation, labeled `expected-by-scope` or `gap`\\n1284\\t             - `Implementation paths absent from resource-map`: `target_files` in applied reports not on the map\\n1285\\t\\n1286\\t          8. **Deferred Items**\\n1287\\t             - Advisory-only or backlog-worthy follow-ups that do not block the current verdict\\n1288\\t\\n1289\\t          9. **Search Ledger**\\n1290\\t             - Always include this section before the appendix.\\n1291\\t             - Render reducer-owned `searchCoverage`, `candidateCoverage`, `searchDebt`, `ruledOutCandidates`, and `cleanSearchProof`.\\n1292\\t             - If all arrays are empty or absent, include: `*No search-depth state captured (legacy v1 record)*`.\\n1293\\t             - When `searchDebt` is non-empty, state `hasSearchDebt: true` and carry the dashboard verdict as CONDITIONAL unless active P0 findings make it FAIL.\\n1294\\t\\n1295\\t          10. **Audit Appendix**\\n1296\\t             - Convergence summary, coverage summary, ruled-out claims, sources reviewed\\n1297\\t             - Cross-reference appendix MUST be split into `Core Protocols` and `Overlay Protocols`\\n1298\\t\\n1299\\t          Preserve machine-owned markers so the reducer-owned registry, dashboard, and strategy anchors can be refreshed on re-run without mutating prior synthesis. (Note: `completed-continue` lineage branch is deferred — see `deep-review/references/protocol/loop_protocol.md §Lifecycle Branches`.)\\n1300\\t        output: \\\"{state_paths.review_output}\\\"\\n1301\\t\\n1302\\t      step_convergence_report:\\n1303\\t        action: \\\"Append convergence report to JSONL\\\"\\n1304\\t        command: |\\n1305\\t          node --input-type=module <<'EOF'\\n1306\\t          import { appendFileSync, existsSync, readFileSync, statSync } from 'node:fs';\\n1307\\t\\n1308\\t          const paths = {\\n1309\\t            stateLog: String.raw`{state_paths.state_log}`,\\n1310\\t            registry: String.raw`{state_paths.findings_registry}`,\\n1311\\t            review: String.raw`{state_paths.review_output}`,\\n1312\\t            dashboard: String.raw`{state_paths.dashboard}`,\\n1313\\t          };\\n1314\\t\\n1315\\t          function hasFile(filePath) {\\n1316\\t            try {\\n1317\\t              return existsSync(filePath) && statSync(filePath).isFile();\\n1318\\t            } catch {\\n1319\\t              return false;\\n1320\\t            }\\n1321\\t          }\\n1322\\t\\n1323\\t          function readJson(filePath) {\\n1324\\t            try {\\n1325\\t              return JSON.parse(readFileSync(filePath, 'utf8'));\\n1326\\t            } catch {\\n1327\\t              return null;\\n1328\\t            }\\n1329\\t          }\\n1330\\t\\n1331\\t          function readJsonl(filePath) {\\n1332\\t            if (!hasFile(filePath)) return [];\\n1333\\t            return readFileSync(filePath, 'utf8')\\n1334\\t              .split(/\\\\r?\\\\n/)\\n1335\\t              .map((line) => line.trim())\\n1336\\t              .filter(Boolean)\\n1337\\t              .flatMap((line) => {\\n1338\\t                try {\\n1339\\t                  return [JSON.parse(line)];\\n1340\\t                } catch {\\n1341\\t                  return [];\\n1342\\t                }\\n1343\\t              });\\n1344\\t          }\\n1345\\t\\n1346\\t          function countIterationFindings(record) {\\n1347\\t            if (!record || record.type !== 'iteration') return 0;\\n1348\\t            const numeric = Number(record.findingsCount);\\n1349\\t            if (Number.isFinite(numeric) && numeric > 0) return Math.floor(numeric);\\n1350\\t            if (Array.isArray(record.findingDetails)) return record.findingDetails.length;\\n1351\\t            return 0;\\n1352\\t          }\\n1353\\t\\n1354\\t          function normalizeFindingKey(value) {\\n1355\\t            return String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\\\\s+/g, ' ');\\n1356\\t          }\\n1357\\t\\n1358\\t          function findingKeys(candidate) {\\n1359\\t            if (typeof candidate === 'string') {\\n1360\\t              const key = normalizeFindingKey(candidate);\\n1361\\t              return key ? [key] : [];\\n1362\\t            }\\n1363\\t            if (!candidate || typeof candidate !== 'object' || Array.isArray(candidate)) return [];\\n1364\\t            return [...new Set([\\n1365\\t              candidate.id,\\n1366\\t              candidate.findingId,\\n1367\\t              candidate.title,\\n1368\\t              candidate.summary,\\n1369\\t              candidate.text,\\n1370\\t              candidate.finding,\\n1371\\t              candidate.description,\\n1372\\t            ].map(normalizeFindingKey).filter(Boolean))];\\n1373\\t          }\\n1374\\t\\n1375\\t          function collectIterationFindingGroups(record) {\\n1376\\t            if (!record || record.type !== 'iteration' || !Array.isArray(record.findingDetails)) return [];\\n1377\\t            return record.findingDetails\\n1378\\t              .map(findingKeys)\\n1379\\t              .filter((keys) => keys.length > 0);\\n1380\\t          }\\n1381\\t\\n1382\\t          function collectRegistryFindingKeys(registry) {\\n1383\\t            return [registry?.openFindings, registry?.resolvedFindings, registry?.repeatedFindings]\\n1384\\t              .filter(Array.isArray)\\n1385\\t              .flatMap((findings) => findings)\\n1386\\t              .flatMap(findingKeys);\\n1387\\t          }\\n1388\\t\\n1389\\t          function appendEvent(event) {\\n1390\\t            appendFileSync(paths.stateLog, `${JSON.stringify(event)}\\\\n`, 'utf8');\\n1391\\t          }\\n1392\\t\\n1393\\t          const registry = readJson(paths.registry);\\n1394\\t          const openCount = Array.isArray(registry?.openFindings) ? registry.openFindings.length : null;\\n1395\\t          const resolvedCount = Array.isArray(registry?.resolvedFindings) ? registry.resolvedFindings.length : 0;\\n1396\\t          const repeatedCount = Array.isArray(registry?.repeatedFindings) ? registry.repeatedFindings.length : 0;\\n1397\\t          const registryFindingCount = openCount === null ? null : openCount + resolvedCount + repeatedCount;\\n1398\\t          const stateRecords = readJsonl(paths.stateLog);\\n1399\\t          const iterationFindingCount = stateRecords.reduce((sum, record) => sum + countIterationFindings(record), 0);\\n1400\\t          const identifiableFindingGroups = stateRecords.flatMap(collectIterationFindingGroups);\\n1401\\t          const registryFindingKeys = new Set(collectRegistryFindingKeys(registry));\\n1402\\t          const missingStructuredFindingCount = identifiableFindingGroups.filter((keys) => !keys.some((key) => registryFindingKeys.has(key))).length;\\n1403\\t          const identifiableFindingCount = identifiableFindingGroups.length;\\n1404\\t          const missingArtifacts = [\\n1405\\t            ['registry', paths.registry],\\n1406\\t            ['review', paths.review],\\n1407\\t            ['dashboard', paths.dashboard],\\n1408\\t          ].filter(([, filePath]) => !hasFile(filePath)).map(([name, filePath]) => ({ name, path: filePath }));\\n1409\\t          const invariantFailures = [];\\n1410\\t          if (missingArtifacts.length > 0) invariantFailures.push('missing_synthesis_artifacts');\\n1411\\t          if (registryFindingCount === null) invariantFailures.push('registry_missing_openFindings');\\n1412\\t          if (iterationFindingCount > 0 && (registryFindingCount ?? 0) === 0) invariantFailures.push('state_findings_not_reflected_in_registry');\\n1413\\t          if (identifiableFindingCount > 0 && registryFindingCount !== null && registryFindingCount < identifiableFindingCount) invariantFailures.push('structured_state_findings_partially_reflected_in_registry');\\n1414\\t          if (missingStructuredFindingCount > 0) invariantFailures.push('structured_state_findings_missing_from_registry');\\n1415\\t\\n1416\\t          if (invariantFailures.length > 0) {\\n1417\\t            appendEvent({\\n1418\\t              type: 'event',\\n1419\\t              event: 'synthesis_incomplete',\\n1420\\t              mode: 'review',\\n1421\\t              severity: 'warning',\\n1422\\t              totalIterations: Number('{iteration_count}'),\\n1423\\t              activeP0: Number('{active_p0}'),\\n1424\\t              activeP1: Number('{active_p1}'),\\n1425\\t              activeP2: Number('{active_p2}'),\\n1426\\t              dimensionCoverage: Number('{dimension_coverage}'),\\n1427\\t              verdict: '{verdict}',\\n1428\\t              releaseReadinessState: '{release_readiness_state}',\\n1429\\t              stopReason: '{reason}',\\n1430\\t              reason: 'synthesis_artifact_invariant_failed',\\n1431\\t              invariantFailures,\\n1432\\t              missingArtifacts,\\n1433\\t              registryFindingCount,\\n1434\\t              iterationFindingCount,\\n1435\\t              identifiableFindingCount,\\n1436\\t              missingStructuredFindingCount,\\n1437\\t              timestamp: '{ISO_8601_NOW}',\\n1438\\t            });\\n1439\\t          } else {\\n1440\\t            appendEvent({\\n1441\\t              type: 'event',\\n1442\\t              event: 'synthesis_complete',\\n1443\\t              mode: 'review',\\n1444\\t              totalIterations: Number('{iteration_count}'),\\n1445\\t              activeP0: Number('{active_p0}'),\\n1446\\t              activeP1: Number('{active_p1}'),\\n1447\\t              activeP2: Number('{active_p2}'),\\n1448\\t              dimensionCoverage: Number('{dimension_coverage}'),\\n1449\\t              verdict: '{verdict}',\\n1450\\t              releaseReadinessState: '{release_readiness_state}',\\n1451\\t              stopReason: '{reason}',\\n1452\\t              timestamp: '{ISO_8601_NOW}',\\n1453\\t            });\\n1454\\t          }\\n1455\\t          EOF\\n1456\\t        note: \\\"Emit as numeric ratio (e.g., 0.75), not quoted string. Compute: dimensions_covered / total_dimensions.\\\"\\n1457\\t\\n1458\\t      step_update_config_status:\\n1459\\t        action: \\\"Mark config as complete\\\"\\n1460\\t        edit: \\\"{state_paths.config}\\\"\\n1461\\t        set_field: { status: \\\"complete\\\" }\\n1462\\t\\n1463\\t      step_stage_artifact_dir:\\n1464\\t        action: \\\"Stage all skill-owned artifacts under artifact_dir for the operator's next git commit\\\"\\n1465\\t        command: \\\"git add {state_paths.packet_dir}\\\"\\n1466\\t        note: \\\"Skill-owned contract fix (028): without this stage step, operators who do `git add review-report.md` lose the iteration trail (iterations/, deltas/, state.jsonl, strategy, findings-registry, etc.). Staging the whole artifact_dir keeps the audit trail intact. Operators retain commit authority and can `git restore --staged {path}` to unstage anything before commit. Failure is non-fatal — log warning and continue.\\\"\\n1467\\t        on_fail: \\\"Log warning. Do not block synthesis. The artifact_dir may be outside a git repo (e.g., temp test fixture) which is a valid case.\\\"\\n1468\\t\\n1469\\t  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\\n1470\\t  # PHASE 4: SAVE\\n1471\\t  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\\n1472\\t  phase_save:\\n1473\\t    purpose: Preserve review context to memory system\\n1474\\t    steps:\\n1475\\t\\n1476\\t      step_compose_save_payload:\\n1477\\t        action: \\\"Compose the structured JSON payload consumed by generate-context.js\\\"\\n1478\\t        output: \\\"/tmp/save-context-data-<session-id>.json\\\"\\n1479\\t        requirements:\\n1480\\t          - \\\"Write this file before invoking generate-context.js; the loader fails closed if the explicit JSON file is absent.\\\"\\n1481\\t          - \\\"Include `specFolder`, a concise `sessionSummary`, curated `observations`, `recent_context`, `toolCalls`, and `exchanges` from the completed review loop.\\\"\\n1482\\t          - \\\"Use a session-scoped temp filename; do not use the retired shared `/tmp/save-context-data.json` path.\\\"\\n1483\\t        example_payload: |\\n1484\\t          {\\n1485\\t            \\\"specFolder\\\": \\\"{spec_folder}\\\",\\n1486\\t            \\\"sessionSummary\\\": \\\"Deep review completed; see review/review-report.md for verdict, findings, and workstreams.\\\",\\n1487\\t            \\\"observations\\\": [\\\"Summarize the active findings, verdict, and remediation guidance.\\\"],\\n1488\\t            \\\"recent_context\\\": [\\\"Point to the generated review artifacts and next action.\\\"],\\n1489\\t            \\\"exchanges\\\": [],\\n1490\\t            \\\"toolCalls\\\": []\\n1491\\t          }\\n1492\\t\\n1493\\t      step_generate_context:\\n1494\\t        action: \\\"Route continuity content into the correct canonical spec document via generate-context.js\\\"\\n1495\\t        command: \\\"node .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/dist/memory/generate-context.js /tmp/save-context-data-<session-id>.json {spec_folder}\\\"\\n1496\\t        critical_rule: \\\"NEVER manually author files under retired memory/ paths (the runtime rejects them); use generate-context.js so the save routes into decision-record.md, implementation-summary.md, or handover.md\\\"\\n1497\\t\\n1498\\t      step_index_memory:\\n1499\\t        action: \\\"Index the routed canonical spec document with memory_save when immediate MCP visibility is required\\\"\\n1500\\t        mcp_tool: memory_save\\n1501\\t        invocation: 'memory_save({ filePath: \\\"[routed-canonical-spec-doc-path]\\\" })'\\n1502\\t        note: \\\"Use the actual canonical spec-doc path returned by generate-context.js (decision-record.md, implementation-summary.md, or handover.md); memory_index_scan remains the bulk fallback\\\"\\n1503\\t\\n1504\\t      step_verify_save:\\n1505\\t        action: \\\"Verify canonical save routed content into the correct spec document\\\"\\n1506\\t        check: \\\"Does {spec_folder}/implementation-summary.md, {spec_folder}/decision-record.md, or {spec_folder}/handover.md carry the new continuity update?\\\"\\n1507\\t        on_fail: \\\"Log warning but do not block completion\\\"\\n1508\\t\\n1509\\t      step_release_lock:\\n1510\\t        action: \\\"Release the single-writer lock after save, skip-save, or cancellation cleanup has resolved\\\"\\n1511\\t        command: \\\"node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/loop-lock.cjs release --lock-path {state_paths.lock_file} --owner-pid {captured_owner_pid}\\\"\\n1512\\t        append_to_jsonl: '{\\\"type\\\":\\\"event\\\",\\\"event\\\":\\\"lock_released\\\",\\\"path\\\":\\\"{state_paths.lock_file}\\\",\\\"releasePhase\\\":\\\"save\\\",\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\\\"}'\\n1513\\t\\n1514\\t  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\\n1515\\t  # COMPLETION\\n1516\\t  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\\n1517\\t  completion:\\n1518\\t    message: |\\n1519\\t      Deep review complete.\\n1520\\t      Iterations: {iteration_count} | Stop reason: {reason}\\n1521\\t      Findings: P0={active_p0} P1={active_p1} P2={active_p2}\\n1522\\t      Verdict: {verdict} | hasAdvisories={has_advisories}\\n1523\\t\\n1524\\t      Artifacts:\\n1525\\t        - review/review-report.md (compiled from {iteration_count} iterations)\\n1526\\t        - {iteration_count} iteration files in review/iterations/\\n1527\\t        - State files in review/: deep-review-config.json, deep-review-state.jsonl, deep-review-findings-registry.json, deep-review-strategy.md, deep-review-dashboard.md\\n1528\\t        - Memory context saved\\n1529\\t\\n1530\\t      STATUS=OK PATH={spec_folder}\\n1531\\t    next_steps:\\n1532\\t      - \\\"/speckit:plan [remediation] (if FAIL or CONDITIONAL verdict)\\\"\\n1533\\t      - \\\"/create:changelog (if PASS, including PASS with hasAdvisories=true)\\\"\\n1534\\t      - \\\"/deep:review [target] (for another review)\\\"\\n1535\\t      - \\\"/memory:save {spec_folder} (refresh canonical continuity before the next session)\\\"\\n1536\\t\\n1537\\t# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n1538\\t# ERROR RECOVERY\\n1539\\t# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n1540\\terror_recovery:\\n1541\\t  agent_dispatch_timeout: \\\"Retry once with reduced scope (fewer files per iteration). If second timeout, mark as 'timeout' and continue.\\\"\\n1542\\t  state_file_missing: \\\"If JSONL missing during loop, reconstruct from iteration files. If strategy missing, create minimal version.\\\"\\n1543\\t  consecutive_failures: \\\"After 3 consecutive errors, halt loop and enter synthesis with partial findings.\\\"\\n1544\\t  memory_save_failure: \\\"Preserve the review packet in review/ as backup. Log warning.\\\"\\n1545\\t\\n1546\\t# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n1547\\t# RULES\\n1548\\t# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n1549\\trules:\\n1550\\t  ALWAYS:\\n1551\\t    - follow_workflow_phases_in_order\\n1552\\t    - dispatch_deep_review_agent_per_iteration\\n1553\\t    - check_convergence_before_each_iteration\\n1554\\t    - write_all_state_to_files\\n1555\\t    - save_memory_context_after_synthesis\\n1556\\t    - respect_max_iterations_cap\\n1557\\t    - treat_review_target_as_read_only\\n1558\\t    - deduplicate_findings_before_synthesis\\n1559\\t    - run_adversarial_selfcheck_on_p0_p1\\n1560\\t  NEVER:\\n1561\\t    - skip_convergence_check\\n1562\\t    - dispatch_non_leaf_agents\\n1563\\t    - hold_iteration_findings_in_memory_only\\n1564\\t    - modify_config_after_initialization\\n1565\\t    - overwrite_jsonl_state_log\\n1566\\t    - proceed_without_state_file_verification\\n1567\\t    - modify_files_under_review\\n1568\\t    - report_p0_without_file_line_evidence\\n1569\\t\\n1570\\t# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n1571\\t# REFERENCE-ONLY APPENDIX\\n1572\\t# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n1573\\treference_only_appendix:\\n1574\\t  checkpoint_commit:\\n1575\\t    note: \\\"Checkpoint commits are intentionally excluded from workflow.steps.\\\"\\n1576\\t    commands:\\n1577\\t      - \\\"git add {state_paths.iteration_pattern} {state_paths.state_log} {state_paths.findings_registry} {state_paths.strategy} {state_paths.review_output}\\\"\\n1578\\t      - 'git commit -m \\\"chore(deep-review): iteration {NNN} complete\\\"'\\n1579\\t  severity_weights:\\n1580\\t    note: \\\"Severity weights for newFindingsRatio calculation\\\"\\n1581\\t    weights:\\n1582\\t      P0: 10.0\\n1583\\t      P1: 5.0\\n1584\\t      P2: 1.0\\n1585\\t    p0_override: \\\"If ANY new P0 discovered → newFindingsRatio = max(calculated, 0.50). A single new P0 blocks convergence.\\\"\\n1586\\t    clean_pass: \\\"If total_findings == 0 (clean pass) → newFindingsRatio = 0.0\\\"\\n1587\\t  review_dimensions:\\n1588\\t    note: \\\"All 4 default review dimensions with priority ordering\\\"\\n1589\\t    dimensions:\\n1590\\t      - { priority: 1, name: \\\"correctness\\\", checks: \\\"Logic, state flow, edge cases, error handling\\\" }\\n1591\\t      - { priority: 2, name: \\\"security\\\", checks: \\\"Auth, input/output safety, data exposure, permissions\\\" }\\n1592\\t      - { priority: 3, name: \\\"traceability\\\", checks: \\\"Spec/checklist alignment, cross-reference integrity, evidence coverage\\\" }\\n1593\\t      - { priority: 4, name: \\\"maintainability\\\", checks: \\\"Patterns, documentation quality, safe follow-on change clarity\\\" }\\n1594\\t  cross_reference_protocols:\\n1595\\t    note: \\\"Cross-reference verification protocols split into core and overlay classes\\\"\\n1596\\t    core_protocols:\\n1597\\t      - { check: \\\"Spec vs Code\\\", source: \\\"spec.md claims\\\", target: \\\"implementation\\\" }\\n1598\\t      - { check: \\\"Checklist vs Evidence\\\", source: \\\"[x] items\\\", target: \\\"cited evidence\\\" }\\n1599\\t    overlay_protocols:\\n1600\\t      - { check: \\\"SKILL.md vs Agent\\\", source: \\\"Skill contracts\\\", target: \\\"agent files\\\" }\\n1601\\t      - { check: \\\"Agent Cross-Runtime\\\", source: \\\".claude\\\", target: \\\".opencode/.agents\\\" }\\n1602\\t      - { check: \\\"Feature Catalog vs Code\\\", source: \\\"Catalog claims\\\", target: \\\"implementation\\\" }\\n1603\\t      - { check: \\\"Playbook vs Support\\\", source: \\\"Scenario preconditions\\\", target: \\\"actual support\\\" }\"}]},\"parent_tool_use_id\":null,\"session_id\":\"973aa353-16bd-47d6-8298-0fa99d62ea0f\",\"uuid\":\"cb6808cf-8882-466b-b4d9-af10d7b72af1\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-07-02T08:57:32.797Z\",\"tool_use_result\":{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"/Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public/.opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_review_auto.yaml\",\"content\":\"            - route_proof_mismatch\\n          warning_surface:\\n            source: \\\"result.warnings\\\"\\n            action: \\\"emit schema_advisory canonical conflict event\\\"\\n            severity: \\\"advisory\\\"\\n            event_shape: '{\\\"type\\\":\\\"event\\\",\\\"event\\\":\\\"schema_advisory\\\",\\\"mode\\\":\\\"review\\\",\\\"iteration\\\":{current_iteration},\\\"warnings\\\":{result.warnings},\\\"severity\\\":\\\"advisory\\\",\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\\\"}'\\n            note: \\\"Warnings do not fail dispatch. Hard failures still emit schema_mismatch through on_failure.\\\"\\n          on_failure:\\n            action: \\\"emit schema_mismatch canonical conflict event\\\"\\n            escalation: \\\"After 3 consecutive failures, trigger stuck_recovery event with diagnostic context\\\"\\n        record_executor_audit:\\n          skip_when: \\\"config.executor.kind == 'native'\\\"\\n          target: \\\"{state_paths.state_log}\\\"\\n          field: \\\"executor\\\"\\n          value:\\n            kind: \\\"{config.executor.kind}\\\"\\n            model: \\\"{config.executor.model}\\\"\\n            reasoningEffort: \\\"{config.executor.reasoningEffort}\\\"\\n            serviceTier: \\\"{config.executor.serviceTier}\\\"\\n\\n      step_evaluate_results:\\n        action: \\\"Verify iteration outputs and extract metrics\\\"\\n        verify:\\n          - file_exists: \\\"{state_paths.iteration_pattern}\\\"\\n          - jsonl_appended: \\\"New iteration record in state.jsonl\\\"\\n          - strategy_updated: \\\"Strategy.md has been modified\\\"\\n        extract:\\n          - newFindingsRatio: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n          - findings_count: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n          - severity_counts: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record (P0, P1, P2)\\\"\\n          - dimensions: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n          - files_reviewed: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n          - status: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n          - reviewed_artifacts: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record\\\"\\n          - traceability_checks: \\\"From latest JSONL iteration record when present\\\"\\n        on_missing_outputs:\\n          action: \\\"Mark iteration as 'error', continue to next\\\"\\n          # Canonical iteration record: include sessionId, generation, durationMs so the reducer can persist\\n          # the failure without dropping the iteration. Schema source: state_format.md §Iteration Records.\\n          append_jsonl: '{\\\"type\\\":\\\"iteration\\\",\\\"iteration\\\":{current_iteration},\\\"run\\\":{current_iteration},\\\"mode\\\":\\\"review\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"error\\\",\\\"focus\\\":\\\"{next_dimension}\\\",\\\"dimensions\\\":[\\\"{next_dimension}\\\"],\\\"filesReviewed\\\":[],\\\"findingsCount\\\":0,\\\"findingsSummary\\\":{\\\"P0\\\":0,\\\"P1\\\":0,\\\"P2\\\":0},\\\"findingsNew\\\":{\\\"P0\\\":0,\\\"P1\\\":0,\\\"P2\\\":0},\\\"findingDetails\\\":[],\\\"traceabilityChecks\\\":{\\\"summary\\\":{\\\"required\\\":0,\\\"executed\\\":0,\\\"pass\\\":0,\\\"partial\\\":0,\\\"fail\\\":0,\\\"blocked\\\":0,\\\"notApplicable\\\":0,\\\"gatingFailures\\\":0},\\\"results\\\":[]},\\\"newFindingsRatio\\\":0.0,\\\"durationMs\\\":0,\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\\\",\\\"sessionId\\\":\\\"{config.lineage.sessionId}\\\",\\\"generation\\\":{config.lineage.generation},\\\"lineageMode\\\":\\\"{config.lineage.lineageMode}\\\"}'\\n\\n      step_post_iteration_claim_adjudication:\\n        action: \\\"Validate typed claim-adjudication packets for any new P0/P1 findings and persist the result to state.jsonl so the next iteration's claimAdjudicationGate can read it\\\"\\n        verify:\\n          - typed_packets_present: \\\"Every new P0/P1 finding in review/iterations/iteration-{NNN}.md contains a claim-adjudication JSON block\\\"\\n          - packet_fields: \\\"Each packet includes claim, evidenceRefs, counterevidenceSought, alternativeExplanation, finalSeverity, confidence, downgradeTrigger\\\"\\n          - missing_packet_ids: \\\"List of new P0/P1 finding IDs that are missing a typed packet or field; empty array when all packets validate\\\"\\n        on_pass:\\n          set:\\n            claim_adjudication_passed: true\\n          append_jsonl: '{\\\"type\\\":\\\"event\\\",\\\"event\\\":\\\"claim_adjudication\\\",\\\"mode\\\":\\\"review\\\",\\\"run\\\":{current_iteration},\\\"passed\\\":true,\\\"activeP0P1\\\":{active_p0_p1_count},\\\"missingPackets\\\":[],\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\\\",\\\"sessionId\\\":\\\"{session_id}\\\",\\\"generation\\\":{generation}}'\\n          log: \\\"Claim adjudication passed for iteration {current_iteration}. All new P0/P1 findings have typed packets.\\\"\\n        on_fail:\\n          action: \\\"Mark the iteration as invalid for convergence. The next iteration's claimAdjudicationGate (step_check_convergence step 0) reads the persisted `passed: false` event and vetoes STOP until a follow-up iteration rewrites the packets.\\\"\\n          set:\\n            claim_adjudication_passed: false\\n          append_jsonl: '{\\\"type\\\":\\\"event\\\",\\\"event\\\":\\\"claim_adjudication\\\",\\\"mode\\\":\\\"review\\\",\\\"run\\\":{current_iteration},\\\"passed\\\":false,\\\"activeP0P1\\\":{active_p0_p1_count},\\\"missingPackets\\\":{missing_packet_ids},\\\"reason\\\":\\\"Missing typed packet fields for new P0/P1 findings\\\",\\\"timestamp\\\":\\\"{ISO_8601_NOW}\\\",\\\"sessionId\\\":\\\"{session_id}\\\",\\\"generation\\\":{generation}}'\\n          log: \\\"Claim adjudication incomplete for new P0/P1 findings. Event persisted. The next iteration's step_check_convergence claim-adjudication pre-check will veto STOP while `passed: false` remains the latest event and active P0/P1 > 0.\\\"\\n\\n      step_reduce_review_state:\\n        action: \\\"Run reducer to refresh the canonical findings registry before dashboard generation\\\"\\n        command: \\\"node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-review/scripts/reduce-state.cjs {spec_folder}\\\"\\n        read:\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.state_log}\\\"\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.iteration_pattern}\\\"\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.findings_registry}\\\"\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.strategy}\\\"\\n        write:\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.findings_registry}\\\"\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.dashboard}\\\"\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.strategy}\\\"\\n        failure_modes:\\n          malformed_delta: \\\"skip + warn\\\"\\n          missing_iteration_file: \\\"no-op + error\\\"\\n          schema_mismatch: \\\"reject + conflict event\\\"\\n        guarantee: \\\"Idempotent for identical inputs\\\"\\n        note: \\\"Reducer outputs findingsRegistry, dashboardMetrics, and strategyUpdates. Re-running the same inputs must be idempotent.\\\"\\n\\n      step_graph_upsert:\\n        action: \\\"Transform the latest iteration graphEvents delta into review graph nodes and edges, then upsert it\\\"\\n        read:\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.state_log}\\\"\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.findings_registry}\\\"\\n        transform: |\\n          1. Read the latest iteration JSONL record after reducer completion.\\n          2. If graphEvents is absent or empty, set graph_nodes_json = [] and graph_edges_json = [] and skip the upsert.\\n          3. For each graph event without relation/source/target, normalize type = uppercase(event.type || event.nodeKind || event.type) and keep only DIMENSION, FILE, FINDING, EVIDENCE, REMEDIATION, BUG_CLASS, INVARIANT, PRODUCER, CONSUMER, TEST.\\n          4. Emit nodes as { id, type, name, iteration, metadata } using the event label (or id fallback) and review metadata for run/current focus.\\n          5. For each graph event with relation + source + target, normalize relation = uppercase(event.relation) and keep only COVERS, EVIDENCE_FOR, CONTRADICTS, RESOLVES, CONFIRMS, ESCALATES, IN_DIMENSION, IN_FILE.\\n          6. Emit edges as { id, relation, sourceId, targetId, metadata } and deduplicate the batch by id.\\n          7. Discard malformed or unknown graph events instead of failing the review iteration.\\n        bash: \\\"node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/upsert.cjs --spec-folder \\\\\\\"{spec_folder}\\\\\\\" --loop-type \\\\\\\"review\\\\\\\" --session-id \\\\\\\"{session_id}\\\\\\\" --nodes '{graph_nodes_json}' --edges '{graph_edges_json}'\\\"\\n        note: \\\"Invoke the runtime script directly. Upsert only the latest iteration graph delta.\\\"\\n        outputs:\\n          - graph_nodes_json: \\\"JSON array of normalized review graph nodes for the latest iteration\\\"\\n          - graph_edges_json: \\\"JSON array of normalized review graph edges for the latest iteration\\\"\\n        skip_conditions:\\n          - \\\"Latest iteration record has no graphEvents array\\\"\\n\\n      step_generate_dashboard:\\n        action: \\\"Generate or refresh the review dashboard\\\"\\n        read:\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.state_log}\\\"\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.findings_registry}\\\"\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.strategy}\\\"\\n        content: |\\n          # Deep Review Dashboard - Session Overview\\n\\n          Auto-generated from JSONL state log and strategy file. Regenerated after every iteration evaluation.\\n\\n          ## Status\\n          - Review Target: {review_target} ({review_target_type})\\n          - Status: [ITERATING | CONVERGING | STUCK_RECOVERY | COMPLETE]\\n          - Iteration: {current_iteration} of {max_iterations}\\n          - Provisional Verdict: [PASS | CONDITIONAL | FAIL | PENDING]\\n          - hasAdvisories: {has_advisories}\\n\\n          ## Findings Summary\\n          | Severity | Count | Trend |\\n          |----------|------:|-------|\\n          | P0 (Blockers) | {p0_count} | {p0_trend} |\\n          | P1 (Required) | {p1_count} | {p1_trend} |\\n          | P2 (Suggestions) | {p2_count} | {p2_trend} |\\n\\n          ## Dimension Coverage\\n          | Dimension | Status | Iteration | Findings |\\n          |-----------|--------|-----------|----------|\\n          | [per dimension from strategy + JSONL] |\\n\\n          ## Traceability Coverage\\n          | Protocol | Level | Status | Findings |\\n          |----------|-------|--------|----------|\\n          | [per protocol from traceabilityChecks] |\\n\\n          ## Progress\\n          | # | Dimension | Ratio | P0/P1/P2 | Status |\\n          |---|-----------|-------|----------|--------|\\n          | [per iteration from JSONL] |\\n\\n          ## Trend\\n          - Last 3 ratios: [{ratios}] [{trend}]\\n          - Stuck count: {stuck_count}\\n          - Gate violations: {guard_violations}\\n\\n          ## Next Focus\\n          {next_dimension}\\n        output: \\\"{state_paths.dashboard}\\\"\\n        note: \\\"Auto-generated from JSONL + strategy. Never manually edited.\\\"\\n\\n      step_update_tracking:\\n        action: \\\"Update loop tracking variables\\\"\\n        set:\\n          current_iteration: \\\"{current_iteration + 1}\\\"\\n          p0_count: \\\"Accumulate from severity_counts\\\"\\n          p1_count: \\\"Accumulate from severity_counts\\\"\\n          p2_count: \\\"Accumulate from severity_counts\\\"\\n          stuck_count: |\\n            if status == 'thought': unchanged (skip)\\n            if status == 'insight': 0 (reset)\\n            if newFindingsRatio <= 0.05: stuck_count + 1\\n            else: 0\\n        log: \\\"Iteration {N} complete. Dimensions: {dimensions}. newFindingsRatio: {newFindingsRatio}. Findings: P0={severity_counts.P0} P1={severity_counts.P1} P2={severity_counts.P2}. Stuck count: {stuck_count}.\\\"\\n\\n      step_loop_decision:\\n        action: \\\"Return to step_read_state for next iteration\\\"\\n        goto: step_read_state\\n\\n  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\\n  # PHASE 3: SYNTHESIS\\n  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\\n  phase_synthesis:\\n    purpose: Compile all iteration findings into review/review-report.md\\n    steps:\\n\\n      step_fanout_merge:\\n        description: \\\"Merge N lineage registries with strongest-restriction; bind p0/p1/p2 counts for step_derive_verdict; skip when single-executor\\\"\\n        skip_when: \\\"config.fanout is absent\\\"\\n        command: |\\n          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-merge.cjs \\\\\\n            --loop-type review \\\\\\n            --artifact-dir {artifact_dir}\\n        working_directory: \\\"{repo_root}\\\"\\n        wait_for_completion: true\\n        bind_from_output:\\n          p0_count: \\\"active_p0\\\"\\n          p1_count: \\\"active_p1\\\"\\n          p2_count: \\\"active_p2\\\"\\n\\n      step_hydrate_summary_metrics:\\n        action: \\\"Hydrate summary metrics before synthesis\\\"\\n        read:\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.config}\\\"\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.state_log}\\\"\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.findings_registry}\\\"\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.strategy}\\\"\\n        extract:\\n          - iteration_count: \\\"Count lines where type === 'iteration'\\\"\\n          - p0_count: \\\"Total P0 findings across all iterations (deduped)\\\"\\n          - p1_count: \\\"Total P1 findings across all iterations (deduped)\\\"\\n          - p2_count: \\\"Total P2 findings across all iterations (deduped)\\\"\\n          - dimensions_covered: \\\"List of reviewed dimensions\\\"\\n          - dimension_coverage: \\\"covered / total\\\"\\n          - ac_coverage_signal: \\\"For spec-folder targets only: if level is 2+ and checklist.md exists and implementation-summary.md is in-progress or later, surface the AC_COVERAGE advisory status; otherwise mark exempt.\\\"\\n          - last_3_summaries: \\\"Summarize the latest 3 iteration records\\\"\\n          - reason: \\\"Use the latest stop reason if present, else the frozen default 'converged'. (Must be a member of the STOP_REASONS enum: converged, maxIterationsReached, blockedStop, stuckRecovery, error, manualStop, userPaused.)\\\"\\n\\n      # H-1 verdict derivation: parse findings JSONL, map highest severity to verdict\\n      # - PASS: no P0 or P1 findings (P2-only or clean)\\n      # - CONDITIONAL: any P1 findings (no P0)\\n      # - FAIL: any P0 findings\\n      # Final line of iteration-NNN.md MUST be exactly: \\\"Review verdict: PASS\\\" / \\\"Review verdict: CONDITIONAL\\\" / \\\"Review verdict: FAIL\\\"\\n      step_derive_verdict:\\n        action: \\\"Derive review verdict from accumulated findings\\\"\\n        algorithm: |\\n          if p0_count > 0:\\n            verdict = \\\"FAIL\\\"\\n          elif p1_count > 0:\\n            verdict = \\\"CONDITIONAL\\\"\\n          else:\\n            verdict = \\\"PASS\\\"\\n          has_advisories = (verdict == \\\"PASS\\\" and p2_count > 0)\\n          ac_coverage_signal is advisory while the validation rule is INFO/default-off; include it in synthesis traceability, but do not change the exact verdict enum from this signal alone.\\n        outputs:\\n          - verdict: \\\"PASS | CONDITIONAL | FAIL\\\"\\n          - has_advisories: \\\"Boolean true when verdict is PASS and any active P2 findings exist\\\"\\n          - ac_coverage_signal: \\\"exempt | disabled | pass | advisory-shortfall\\\"\\n        contract: |\\n          Every iteration-NNN.md must end with exactly: \\\"Review verdict: PASS\\\" (or CONDITIONAL or FAIL).\\n          Downstream automation parses this final line via exact string match — do not vary the format.\\n\\n      step_read_all_iterations:\\n        action: \\\"Read all iteration files and strategy\\\"\\n        read_pattern: \\\"{state_paths.iteration_dir}/iteration-*.md\\\"\\n        read_also: \\\"{state_paths.strategy}\\\"\\n\\n      step_build_finding_registry:\\n        action: \\\"Build deduplicated finding registry from all iterations\\\"\\n        algorithm: |\\n          1. Extract all findings from iteration JSONL delta files\\n          2. Compute content_hash for each finding (emission requirement):\\n             content_hash = sha256(file_path + \\\"\\\\u001f\\\" + line_range + \\\"\\\\u001f\\\" + finding_type + \\\"\\\\u001f\\\" + normalized_description_80chars)\\n             Normalized description = whitespace-collapsed, lowercased, first 80 chars of the finding description.\\n          3. Two-tier dedup:\\n             PRIMARY: group by content_hash field\\n               - Same content_hash, multiple dimensions → single finding, merged `dimensions: [<all>]` array\\n               - Keep highest severity on duplicates\\n             FALLBACK (legacy records lacking content_hash): file:line + normalized_title\\n               - Same file:line, multiple dimensions → single finding, multiple dimension tags\\n               - Keep highest severity on duplicates\\n          4. Track finding lifecycle:\\n             - status: active | duplicate | upgraded | downgraded | contested | resolved_false_positive\\n             - Record first_seen, upgraded_in, previous_severity for severity changes\\n             - Record dimensions array reflecting all dimensions that emitted this finding\\n          5. Resolve contradictions:\\n             - Findings marked contested across iterations → referee pass\\n             - Determine final severity and status\\n          6. Count only 'active' findings for totals\\n        outputs:\\n          - finding_registry: \\\"Deduplicated list of all findings with metadata\\\"\\n          - active_p0: \\\"Count of active P0 findings\\\"\\n          - active_p1: \\\"Count of active P1 findings\\\"\\n          - active_p2: \\\"Count of active P2 findings\\\"\\n\\n      step_adversarial_selfcheck:\\n        action: \\\"Final adversarial self-check on all P0 and P1 findings\\\"\\n        algorithm: |\\n          For each active P0/P1 finding:\\n            1. Hunter: Re-verify finding against source code (re-read file:line)\\n            2. Skeptic: Challenge severity — is this really P0/P1? Could it be P2?\\n            3. Referee: Final call — confirm, downgrade, or mark false_positive\\n          Update finding_registry with adjudicated results.\\n\\n      step_emit_resource_map:\\n        action: \\\"Emit {state_paths.resource_map_output} from converged review deltas unless config.resource_map.emit is false\\\"\\n        command: \\\"node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-workflows/deep-review/scripts/reduce-state.cjs {spec_folder} --emit-resource-map\\\"\\n        read:\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.config}\\\"\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.delta_dir}/iter-*.jsonl\\\"\\n        write:\\n          - \\\"{state_paths.resource_map_output}\\\"\\n        guarantee: \\\"Reducer skips cleanly when config.resource_map.emit == false and writes a deterministic resource-map when enabled.\\\"\\n\\n      step_resource_map_coverage_gate:\\n        action: \\\"If resource_map_present, compute the Resource Map Coverage Gate synthesis inputs; otherwise preserve the skip note\\\"\\n        note: \\\"Cross-check target_files from {spec_folder}/applied/T-*.md against {spec_folder}/resource-map.md. Report touched entries, untouched entries split into expected-by-scope vs gap, and implementation paths absent from the map. Findings raised here use category resource-map-coverage with severity calibrated to the gate outcome.\\\"\\n\\n      step_compile_review_report:\\n        action: \\\"Compile review/review-report.md with 9 core sections, a conditional Resource Map Coverage Gate section, and an embedded Planning Packet\\\"\\n        instructions: |\\n          Create review/review-report.md with the following sections:\\n\\n          1. **Executive Summary**\\n             - Overall verdict: PASS | CONDITIONAL | FAIL\\n             - hasAdvisories: true when PASS carries active P2 items\\n             - P0/P1/P2 counts (active only)\\n             - Review scope summary\\n\\n          2. **Planning Trigger**\\n             - State whether `/speckit:plan` is required\\n             - Include a fenced `json` block labeled `Planning Packet`\\n             - The packet MUST include: `triggered`, `verdict`, `hasAdvisories`, `activeFindings`, `remediationWorkstreams`, `specSeed`, `planSeed`, `findingClasses`, `affectedSurfacesSeed`, `fixCompletenessRequired`\\n             -
